cases.title: 黄金时刻猛犸象旁的灵动少女
cases.prompt: A joyful young woman with long, voluminous wavy golden hair cascading over her shoulders, strands softly catching the sunlight, laughing openly with a carefree, radiant smile that shows pure happiness. She is sitting casually on an ancient weathered stone platform, surrounded by enormous carved stone woolly mammoth statues, their massive tusks and textured stone surfaces evoking a dramatic prehistoric atmosphere inside a sunlit paleontological park. She wears a flowy emerald green slip dress with a subtle leopard print pattern, lightweight fabric gently moving with the summer breeze, thin delicate straps resting naturally on her shoulders, the dress draping elegantly over her figure. On her feet are black platform sandals, modern and stylish, contrasting beautifully with the ancient surroundings. Beside her on the stone rests a black geometric chain bag, structured design with metallic chain details catching soft highlights. Her posture is relaxed and natural, one hand resting behind her for balance, the other loosely placed on her knee, body slightly turned toward the light. Her expression is full of life—eyes slightly squinted from laughter, cheeks softly flushed, glowing skin with natural makeup, sun-kissed warmth. The scene is captured during a sunny summer day at golden hour, with warm golden light wrapping around her and the statues, creating a dreamy glow. The background fades into a soft creamy bokeh, with hints of greenery, stone pathways, and distant sculptures blurred for depth. Colors are vibrant yet natural, rich greens, warm stone tones, and golden highlights perfectly balanced. Shot in a high-end fashion photography style, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp subject focus with beautifully textured fabrics and skin detail. She is sitting casually on an ancient weathered stone platform, surrounded by enormous carved stone woolly mammoth statues, their massive tusks and textured stone surfaces evoking a dramatic prehistoric atmosphere inside a sunlit paleontological park. She wears a flowy emerald green slip dress with a subtle leopard print pattern, lightweight fabric gently moving with the summer breeze, thin delicate straps resting naturally on her shoulders, the dress draping elegantly over her figure. On her feet are black platform sandals, modern and stylish, contrasting beautifully with the ancient surroundings. Beside her on the stone rests a black geometric chain bag, structured design with metallic chain details catching soft highlights. Her posture is relaxed and natural, one hand resting behind her for balance, the other loosely placed on her knee, body slightly turned toward the light. Her expression is full of life—eyes slightly squinted from laughter, cheeks softly flushed, glowing skin with natural makeup, sun-kissed warmth. The scene is captured during a sunny summer day at golden hour, with warm golden light wrapping around her and the statues, creating a dreamy glow. The background fades into a soft creamy bokeh, with hints of greenery, stone pathways, and distant sculptures blurred for depth. Colors are vibrant yet natural, rich greens, warm stone tones, and golden highlights perfectly balanced. prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 一位快乐的年轻女子，一头浓密波浪状的金色长发披散在肩上，发丝在阳光下轻轻闪耀，她开怀大笑，脸上洋溢着无忧无虑、灿烂的笑容，展现出纯粹的幸福。她随意地坐在一座古老的风化石台上，周围环绕着巨大的石雕猛犸象雕像，它们巨大的象牙和粗糙的石质表面在阳光普照的古生物公园内营造出一种戏剧性的史前氛围。 她穿着一件飘逸的祖母绿吊带裙，带有微妙的豹纹图案，轻盈的面料随着夏日的微风轻轻摆动，纤细精致的肩带自然地搭在肩上，裙子优雅地垂坠在她的身上。脚上穿着黑色厚底凉鞋，现代而时尚，与古老的周围环境形成了美丽的对比。她身旁的石头上放着一个黑色几何链条包，结构化的设计和金属链条细节捕捉着柔和的光线。 她的姿势放松而自然，一只手放在身后以保持平衡，另一只手随意地放在膝盖上，身体微微转向光线。她的表情充满活力——眼睛因笑容而微微眯起，脸颊泛着淡淡的红晕，皮肤在自然妆容下焕发光彩，散发着阳光亲吻般的温暖。 场景捕捉于一个阳光明媚的夏日黄金时段，温暖的金色光线环绕着她和雕像，营造出梦幻般的光芒。背景虚化成柔和的奶油色散景，隐约可见的绿色植物、石板小径和远处的雕塑模糊不清，增加了景深。色彩鲜艳而自然，浓郁的绿色、温暖的石色调和金色高光完美平衡。 以高端时尚摄影风格拍摄，电影般的构图，浅景深，主体对焦超清晰，织物和皮肤细节纹理精美。高度细致，超写实，逼真的阴影和光线衰减，有机胶片颗粒，富士 Superia 400 胶片特有的微妙色彩偏移，怀旧而现代的美学，专业编辑品质，8k 真实感，自然动态，抓拍式生活时尚瞬间。

cases.title: 黑红光影下的持枪反英雄
cases.prompt: Create a striking neo-noir fashion portrait of a man dressed in a sharp black three-piece suit, white dress shirt, and slim black tie, carrying a gun in the hands. He faces slightly downward and to the side, head tilted with a brooding, introspective expression. His presence feels controlled, distant, and powerful—like a stylish anti-hero caught between worlds. He has medium-length wavy dark hair falling loosely around his temples, a well-groomed beard, and wears round black sunglasses that completely conceal his eyes, amplifying mystery and authority. His posture is relaxed yet deliberate, conveying confidence without effort. The subject is rendered in dramatic black and white, while the background is a rich, textured crimson red, creating intense contrast and visual impact. The red backdrop feels symbolic and emotional, evoking danger, passion, rebellion, and cinematic tension. Lighting is moody and directional, sculpting facial features and suit fabric with subtle highlights and deep shadows. Fine film grain and painterly texture add an editorial, poster-like quality. The image feels like a luxury fashion campaign, noir graphic novel cover, or arthouse film poster. Use aspect ratio 4:5.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 创作一张引人注目的新黑色时尚肖像，描绘一位男士身着考究的黑色三件套西装、白色正装衬衫和修身黑领带，手中拿着 枪. 他头部微倾，脸部略微朝下并转向一侧，神情沉郁而内省。他的存在感显得克制、疏离而强大——如同一个游走于不同世界之间的时尚反英雄。他留着中等长度的波浪形深色头发，发丝随意地散落在太阳穴周围，蓄着修剪整齐的胡须，戴着完全遮住眼睛的圆形黑色墨镜，这更增添了他的神秘感和权威性。他的姿态放松却又刻意，毫不费力地流露出自信。主体以戏剧性的黑白呈现，而背景则是浓郁、富有质感的 深红色，营造出强烈的对比和视觉冲击力。红色背景象征着危险、激情、叛逆和电影般的张力，充满情感色彩。光线阴沉且具有方向性，通过微妙的高光和深邃的阴影勾勒出面部特征和西装面料。细腻的胶片颗粒和绘画般的纹理增添了编辑感和海报般的质感。这张图片感觉就像一个奢侈品时尚广告、一部黑色漫画小说的封面，或是一张艺术电影海报。使用 4:5 的宽高比。

cases.title: 异想海底城美人鱼漫游荧光径
cases.prompt: Imagine a serene, futuristic library on an alien planet, filled with glowing holographic books and strange, beautiful flora. How about a breathtaking view of a vibrant, bioluminescent coral reef at twilight, teeming with exotic fish and glowing marine life, all beneath a surface shimmering with the last rays of the setting sun? how about a vibrant, whimsical underwater city, bustling with marine life and glowing coral structures, where mermaids and other fantastical sea creatures gracefully navigate illuminated pathways?

prompts.text: 想象一下，在一个外星球上，有一座宁静而充满未来感的图书馆，里面摆满了发光的全息书籍和奇特而美丽的植物。 再想象一下，在黄昏时分，一个充满活力的生物发光珊瑚礁呈现出令人惊叹的景色，异国情调的鱼类和发光的海洋生物熙熙攘攘，所有这些都在被落日余晖照耀得波光粼粼的海面之下。 或者，想象一座充满活力、异想天开的海底城市，海洋生物熙熙攘攘，发光的珊瑚结构随处可见，美人鱼和其他奇幻的海洋生物优雅地穿梭于灯火通明的通道中？

cases.title: 极致写实的沙发iPad创作人像
cases.prompt: Ultra-photorealistic editorial lifestyle photograph shot on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm f/1.8 lens. Natural indoor daylight from the left. THE_SUBJECT (from attached reference) must be replicated with 100% identity fidelity, exact facial structure, skin tone, proportions, and natural texture. THE_SUBJECT is seated on a couch, angled slightly toward camera, holding a large 12.9-inch iPad Pro vertically and showing the screen directly to the viewer. In the other hand, THE_SUBJECT holds an Apple Pencil naturally, as if paused mid-drawing. Insert THE_SCREEN (attached reference image) exactly onto the iPad display with correct proportions and perspective. The screen should appear realistically illuminated with subtle glass reflections and edge glare. Both face and iPad screen in sharp focus. No stylization, no illustration effect; it must look like a real professional photograph.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 超逼真的编辑类生活方式照片，使用全画幅单反相机和 85mm f/1.8 镜头拍摄。左侧射入自然室内日光。THE_SUBJECT（来自附件参考图）必须 100% 忠实复制，包括精确的面部结构、肤色、比例和自然纹理。 THE_SUBJECT 坐在沙发上，身体略微朝向相机，垂直握持一台大型 12.9 英寸 iPad Pro，屏幕直接面向观看者。THE_SUBJECT 的另一只手自然地握着一支 Apple Pencil，仿佛在绘画中途暂停。 将 THE_SCREEN（附件参考图）精确地插入到 iPad 屏幕上，并确保正确的比例和透视。屏幕应呈现逼真的光照效果，带有细微的玻璃反光和边缘眩光。面部和 iPad 屏幕均需清晰对焦。无风格化，无插画效果；必须看起来像一张真实的专业照片。

The background shows the vibrant lights and billboards of Times Square, slightly abstract and bright, emphasizing the contrast between motion blur and her static presence. prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 一个 10 岁的巴勒斯坦男孩，灵感来自纳吉·阿里 (Naji al-Ali) 的哈姆扎拉 (Handala) 角色，在加沙海滩日落时分，背对观众站在岩石上，双手 clasped 在背后，穿着破旧的简陋衣服，赤脚，短而凌乱的头发，在海面和地平线衬托下形成剪影，头巾松散地围在脖子上，短语“To exist is to resist”以粗体白色手写英文字母漂浮在空中或刻在他面前的沙滩上，戏剧性的黄金时段光线，温暖的橙色和深蓝色调，坚韧抵抗和“sumud”（坚韧不拔）的情感和象征氛围，写实风格，略带经典哈姆扎拉画作的卡通影响，高细节，电影构图，8k 分辨率

cases.title: 极简黑白质感人像与橙色墨镜
cases.prompt: A studio-style close-up editorial portrait of a person with strong, well-defined facial features and slightly imperfect, natural skin texture. The subject wears a black tailored turtleneck with sharp, clean lines, layered under a high-collared black jacket in a minimalist contemporary fashion style.The subject wears semi-transparent orange acetate sunglasses — rectangular frames with softly rounded edges, glossy finish, and amber gradient lenses — serving as the only colored element in the image.Color concept: selective color photography — monochrome black-and-white image with only the sunglasses in vivid orange. Mood is calm and confident, serious expression, direct gaze into the camera. Lighting is soft frontal studio light with gentle shadows, even skin tones, cinematic contrast, and visible natural skin texture. Shot on a professional portrait camera, f/2.0, ISO 100, 1/125s. High resolution, ultra-sharp focus on the face. Style: editorial luxury fashion portrait, photorealistic, professional studio photography, no illustration, no painterly effects.

prompts.label: 英文提示词
prompts.text: A studio-style close-up editorial portrait of a person with strong, well-defined facial features and slightly imperfect, natural skin texture. The subject wears a black tailored turtleneck with sharp, clean lines, layered under a high-collared black jacket in a minimalist contemporary fashion style.The subject wears semi-transparent orange acetate sunglasses — rectangular frames with softly rounded edges, glossy finish, and amber gradient lenses — serving as the only colored element in the image.Color concept: selective color photography — monochrome black-and-white image with only the sunglasses in vivid orange. Mood is calm and confident, serious expression, direct gaze into the camera. Lighting is soft frontal studio light with gentle shadows, even skin tones, cinematic contrast, and visible natural skin texture. Shot on a professional portrait camera, f/2.0, ISO 100, 1/125s. High resolution, ultra-sharp focus on the face. Style: editorial luxury fashion portrait, photorealistic, professional studio photography, no illustration, no painterly effects.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 一张影棚风格的特写编辑肖像，人物面部特征鲜明、轮廓分明，皮肤纹理自然，略带瑕疵。拍摄对象身穿黑色定制高领毛衣，线条流畅利落，外搭一件高领黑色夹克，整体呈现简约现代的时尚风格。拍摄对象戴着半透明的 orange 醋酸纤维太阳镜——方形镜框，边缘柔和圆润，光泽感强，琥珀色渐变镜片——这是图像中唯一的彩色元素。色彩概念：选择性色彩摄影——黑白单色图像，只有太阳镜呈现鲜艳的 orange。 情绪平静自信，表情严肃，目光直视镜头。 灯光为柔和的前置影棚光，阴影轻柔，肤色均匀，电影感对比度，自然皮肤纹理清晰可见。使用专业人像相机拍摄，f/2.0，ISO 100，1/125s。高分辨率，面部对焦超清晰。 风格：编辑级奢华时尚肖像，超写实，专业影棚摄影，无插画，无绘画效果。

prompts.text: { "subject": { "description": "一位年轻女士，留着蜂蜜棕色长发，半扎半披，几缕发丝自然地垂落在脸庞。她肤色白皙，皮肤纹理自然。她穿着一套淡粉色内衣，文胸上缘饰有精致的扇形蕾丝花边，中央有前扣，搭配同色系粉色内裤。她还穿着黑色过膝袜，袜口有两条白色横纹。她的身材特点是腰肢纤细，呈沙漏形，胸部丰满，显得饱满、沉甸甸，受重力影响自然下垂，乳沟深邃，向前突出明显。胸部体积突出，与肋骨深度形成鲜明对比。", "anatomy_constraints": "保持参考图中胸部的确切体积和质量。确保胸部明显大于平均尺寸，具有逼真的软组织行为和重力感。不要缩小、压平或使胸部尺寸正常化。保持胸部突出与肋骨深度之间明显的差异。皮肤必须显示自然的毛孔和纹理，而不是塑料般的平滑感。" }, "pose": { "description": "主体坐着，可能在床上，正对着镜头。她的身体略微前倾。双臂向下伸展，双手舒适地放在大腿上部，刚好在过膝袜上方。双腿略微分开。头部略微向右倾斜，目光柔和而迷人地直视观者。", "skeletal_lock": "保持肩膀的确切角度、躯干的轻微前倾、手在大腿上的位置以及头部的特定倾斜度。" }, "environment": { "setting": "明亮的居家卧室内部。", "elements": [ "背景是白墙", "左侧有一幅带黑色边框的画作，图案是抽象的金色/黄色吊灯状设计", "主体下方是白色或浅灰色有纹理的床上用品/床单", "右边缘隐约可见深灰色枕头或织物" ] }, "camera": { "shot_type": "中景（大腿以上）", "perspective": "平视，由于坐姿，相对于躯干略微高角度。", "focal_length": "50mm 至 85mm 等效焦距（人像镜头）", "depth_of_field": "景深略浅，主体清晰对焦，背景的艺术品和墙壁略微柔化。", "framing": "主体居中，裁剪至过膝袜顶部下方。" }, "lighting": { "type": "自然散射日光", "direction": "左前方（观者左侧）", "quality": "柔和均匀，在前额、上胸部和肩膀上形成柔和的高光。", "shadows": "躯干右侧和下巴下方有微妙自然的阴影，勾勒出腹肌和锁骨。" }, "mood_and_expression": { "emotion": "放松、自信、略带挑逗" } }

cases.title: 创作现代几何字体概念海报
cases.prompt:
请基于用户输入的【核心文字 / 单词 / 词组 / 短句 / 字母】，创作一张高完成度的「现代平面几何字体概念海报 / Geometric Typographic Concept Poster」。这不是普通插画，也不是简单把文字放大后的字效海报，而是一张“基于主题词含义自动构建视觉隐喻”的现代平面设计海报。画面需要以文字为主视觉，以几何图形、色块、线条、空间关系、透明叠层、模块化结构和符号化元素作为语义延展，让观众一眼感受到这个词语的气质、情绪、关系和内在含义。

用户输入如下：核心文字 / 单词 / 词组 / 短句 / 字母：【____】；
文字语言：【中文 / 英文 / 中英混排】；
可选补充语境：【____】；
可选情绪倾向：【____】；
可选禁用元素：【____】。

请先真正理解用户输入内容的字面含义、情绪气质、隐含象征、文化联想、心理感受、语义张力，并判断它更偏向哪一类主题：如果是情绪型，例如孤独、自由、热烈、焦虑、松弛、压抑、浪漫、冷漠，请重点通过色块关系、留白比例、图形距离、方向感、密度变化、视觉重心来表达；如果是动作型，例如逃离、靠近、坠落、生长、爆发、旋转、流动、停滞，请重点通过几何运动轨迹、字体切割与错位、方向线条、模块推进关系、斜向构图和速度感来表达；如果是关系型，例如连接、对抗、平衡、依赖、分裂、共生、拉扯、融合，请重点通过两个或多个主体之间的距离、重叠、分离、嵌套、包裹、对称、失衡、碰撞、交错、连接节点和中介结构来表达；如果是抽象概念型，例如时间、秩序、边界、记忆、命运、欲望、真相、规则、偏见，请先找到一个简洁但具体的视觉隐喻，再通过系统感排版、网格变化、遮挡、偏移、层级结构、模块重复与变化来表达；如果是具象物象型，例如火焰、种子、月亮、桥梁、岛屿、风、镜子，不要直接画成写实插图，而应将其提炼为符号化、几何化、排版化、结构化的视觉表达。

整体画面应呈现为一张现代、清爽、有设计感、有传播力、有视觉记忆点、图形与文字强关联、有概念但不空洞、大胆但不杂乱、有留白但不单薄的现代平面几何字体概念海报。用户输入的文字必须作为画面核心标题，成为第一视觉主体；文字可以横排、竖排、拆分、错位、重组、局部遮挡、嵌套、切片、偏移、透明覆盖，或与几何图形形成正负形关系；图形元素必须围绕文字展开，可以穿过文字、支撑文字、切割文字、包裹文字，并与文字形成结构互动；画面元素数量要控制，建议以 1 组核心文字主体、1 组核心几何隐喻系统、少量辅助线条 / 标签 / 点阵 / 小字信息为主；必须保留足够留白，让画面透气、清爽、有当代感；构图可以大胆，但不能让文字失去可读性；整张画面要有封面感、展览海报感、传播感和视觉停留感。

视觉风格请采用 modern graphic design、geometric composition、typographic poster、experimental typography、clean flat design、crisp vector-like precision、contemporary visual identity aesthetics 的方向，整体气质应现代、平面、清亮、理性、有设计感、有实验性、有系统感、有高级感，不复古、不厚重、不脏乱、不空洞。请避免以下风格：普通插画、写实摄影、复古文学封面、包豪斯旧海报感、构成主义老派风格、厚重建筑隐喻、暗黑戏剧化、电商海报感、PPT 封面感、过度模板感。

请根据主题词的气质自动选择最匹配的配色方案，但整体要保持现代、醒目、干净、有设计感。例如，活力 / 热烈 / 爆发可使用 bright orange、coral red、vivid yellow、electric blue；冷静 / 秩序 / 理性可使用 navy、black、white、gray、silver blue；温柔 / 记忆 / 柔和可使用 soft pink、warm white、pale green、light yellow、muted lavender；冲突 / 危险 / 对抗可使用 red、black、white、neon green 等高对比配色；自由 / 轻盈 / 开放可使用 sky blue、mint green、white、bright yellow、aqua cyan；神秘 / 哲思 / 深层意识可使用 indigo、deep violet、black 与亮色点缀。可以使用高明度现代色、少量渐变、半透明几何片，但不要做旧、不要脏、不要厚重、不要灰暗沉闷，整体要“轻盈但有力量，现代但不空洞”。

字体与排版必须清晰、醒目、可读，且具有现代感、几何感、设计感和一定实验性；中文适合使用有力量的无衬线标题字、几何字体、现代设计感字体，英文适合使用 bold grotesk、condensed sans、geometric sans、editorial sans 等风格；允许局部变形，但不能影响整体识别；字体与图形之间应有明确互动关系，而不是图文分离；可以加入一句非常短的小字说明来深化主题，例如 “A visual state of ____”、“The shape of ____”、“Between ____ and ____”，或根据中文语境自动生成一句简洁副标题，但必须克制，不要抢核心文字的视觉权重。

图形元素不能只是装饰，必须对主题词形成视觉解释；可使用圆形、矩形、三角形、线段、圆环、路径线、网格、波形、箭头、模块化色块、透明叠层、点阵、标签、切片、偏移框、数据感辅助符号等元素；图形必须服务主题语义、强化排版节奏、增加视觉记忆点、不喧宾夺主，并与文字共同构成一个完整的视觉句子。整体质感应干净、crisp、vector-like、带轻微数字感、精致、高级、平面、当代；可以有非常轻微的渐变、少量透明叠层、细腻而克制的设计颗粒感；不要厚重纹理、脏旧纸张、过度噪点、油画质感、复古拼贴、大面积阴影或复杂立体建模感。

请避免以下问题：不要做成普通插画、不要做成写实摄影、不要做成复古旧海报、不要做成厚重文学封面、不要堆砌过多元素、不要让图形和词义脱节、不要只是把文字放大后加背景、不要出现廉价模板感、不要过度装饰、不要让画面灰暗沉闷脏乱、不要让文字不可读。最终成图应呈现为一张现代、平面、几何、极简、醒目、好看、有概念、有传播力的字体概念海报，让人感觉“这个词被设计成了一个视觉符号”、“图形不是装饰，而是在解释这个词”、“字体、图形、色彩和留白共同组成了一个完整的视觉句子”、“AI 真正理解了这个主题词，然后进行了设计，而不是只做表面装饰”。

图形元素不能只是装饰，必须对主题词形成视觉解释；可使用圆形、矩形、三角形、线段、圆环、路径线、网格、波形、箭头、模块化色块、透明叠层、点阵、标签、切片、偏移框、数据感辅助符号等元素；图形必须服务主题语义、强化排版节奏、增加视觉记忆点、不喧宾夺主，并与文字共同构成一个完整的视觉句子。整体质感应干净、crisp、vector-like、带轻微数字感、精致、高级、平面、当代；可以有非常轻微的渐变、少量透明叠层、细腻而克制的设计颗粒感；不要厚重纹理、脏旧纸张、过度噪点、油画质感、复古拼贴、大面积阴影或复杂立体建模感。

请避免以下问题：不要做成普通插画、不要做成写实摄影、不要做成复古旧海报、不要做成厚重文学封面、不要堆砌过多元素、不要让图形和词义脱节、不要只是把文字放大后加背景、不要出现廉价模板感、不要过度装饰、不要让画面灰暗沉闷脏乱、不要让文字不可读。最终成图应呈现为一张现代、平面、几何、极简、醒目、好看、有概念、有传播力的字体概念海报，让人感觉“这个词被设计成了一个视觉符号”、“图形不是装饰，而是在解释这个词”、“字体、图形、色彩和留白共同组成了一个完整的视觉句子”、“AI 真正理解了这个主题词，然后进行了设计，而不是只做表面装饰”。

prompts.text: 极其美丽的女人，带着冷酷、超然的氛围感，精致细腻的面部特征，冷艳的高级脸，飘逸的长发，优雅迷人的身材，（角色特征完全锁定且一致）场景：带有镜子的室内空间（浴室或镜子墙），多重倒影，空间具有层次感姿势：站在镜子前，一只手轻轻触摸镜面或放在台面上，身体微侧，头部轻轻转向镜头表情：平静且面无表情，带有一丝冷漠与疏离感相机角度：低角度或轻微侧角拍摄，画面中清晰可见镜中的倒影光线：以冷白光为主光源，带有局部阴影，强调结构轮廓和立体感风格：高端时尚杂志大片，微妙的胶片颗粒感，低对比度细节：细腻逼真的皮肤纹理，清晰却柔和有层次且略带模糊的镜面倒影氛围：克制、理性、疏离，带有一丝超现实的失真感画质：超清晰8K，极致细节，电影级光影，唯美的景深虚化。

cases.prompt:
Full-body fashion editorial shot of a confident young person model sitting casually on a concrete ledge, legs slightly apart, one arm resting on knee, the other relaxed, looking straight at camera with a calm dominant expression.

Wearing a light denim jacket over a plain white t-shirt, neutral shorts, bright socks, and modern sneakers. Clean styling, natural pose, wind slightly moving hair and fabric.

Beside and partially interacting with a stylized cartoon [ANIMAL], positioned naturally as if sharing the same space.

The [ANIMAL] is illustrated in bold cartoon style with thick black outlines, vibrant neon color palette (blue, green, yellow accents), exaggerated proportions, expressive features, playful yet powerful presence.

Background: bright outdoor urban setting with clear blue sky, soft clouds, sunlit concrete textures, strong natural daylight, crisp shadows.

Fusion of hyper-realistic photography and graphic illustration, seamless integration between subject and cartoon.

Add graphic overlay elements: doodle arrows, scribbles, abstract shapes, comic-style symbols, dynamic motion lines.

High contrast, HDR lighting, sharp focus, fashion editorial composition, surreal mixed-media aesthetic, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text:
一位自信的年轻模特的全身时尚大片拍摄，随意坐在混凝土边缘，双腿微张，一只手臂搭在膝盖上，另一只手放松，直视镜头，带着平静而强势的表情。

内搭纯白色T恤外穿浅色牛仔夹克，中性色调短裤，亮色袜子和现代运动鞋。干净的造型，自然的姿势，微风轻轻吹动头发和面料。

旁边并部分与一个风格化的卡通[ANIMAL]互动，位置自然，仿佛共享同一个空间。

该[ANIMAL]以大胆的卡通风格绘制，具有粗黑的轮廓线，充满活力的霓虹色调（蓝色、绿色、黄色点缀），夸张的比例，富有表现力的特征，俏皮而强大的存在感。

背景：明亮的室外城市场景，清澈的蓝天，柔和的云朵，阳光照射的混凝土纹理，强烈的自然日光，清晰的阴影。

超写实摄影与图形插画的融合，主体与卡通之间无缝结合。

添加图形叠加元素：涂鸦箭头、乱涂乱画、抽象形状、漫画风格的符号、动态的运动线条。

高对比度，HDR光照，锐利的焦点，时尚大片构图，超现实混合媒体美学，超精细，8k分辨率。

cases.title: 山水长卷环绕的国风少女
cases.prompt: Oriental fantasy Chinese style anime illustration, the main subject of the picture is a bust portrait of a young oriental girl, she is wearing a red neo-Chinese style spaghetti strap cheongsam dress, draped with a translucent light blue and white sheer veil, fair and delicate skin, exquisite facial features, clear and bright blue eyes, a cold and elegant expression. Her long black hair is fluttering wildly in the wind, the hair strands have delicate highlights. On her head, she wears a gold hollowed-out classical hair crown, paired with ruby and cyan-green gemstone jewelry. In the picture, there is a huge floating long scroll in the style of a landscape painting surrounding the character, forming an elegant S-shaped dynamic composition, the background is a deep blue night courtyard, blooming white cherry blossom branches stretch into the picture from above, petals falling with the wind. In the upper right corner, there is a warm golden backlight, passing through the flower branches and hair strands, forming soft halos, rim lights and air particles. The foreground is decorated with crystal glowing blue flowers. The overall style is dreamy, gorgeous, ethereal, with high-end anime impasto texture, cinematic lighting and shadows, cold and warm contrast and exquisite details. Aspect ratio 9:16, no text, watermarks and logos.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text:
东方幻想国风动漫插画，画面主体是一位年轻东方少女半身肖像，她穿着红色新中式吊带旗袍礼服，外披半透明浅蓝白薄纱，皮肤白皙细腻，五官精致，蓝色眼睛清澈明亮，表情清冷优雅。她的黑色长发在风中大幅飘散，发丝有细腻高光。头上佩戴金色镂空古典发冠，搭配红宝石与青绿色宝石首饰。

画面中有一条巨大的飘动山水画风格的长卷轴环绕人物，形成优雅的 S 型动态构图，背景是深蓝夜色庭院，盛开的白色樱花枝从上方伸入画面，花瓣随风飘落。右上角有暖金色逆光，穿过花枝和发丝，形成柔和光晕、轮廓光和空气粒子。前景点缀晶莹发光的蓝色花朵。整体风格梦幻、华丽、空灵，具有高端二次元厚涂质感、电影级光影、冷暖对比和精致细节。比例 9:16，不要文字、水印和 logo。

cases.title: 雨夜公交站等车的少女
cases.prompt: At a city bus stop on a rainy night, a young adult woman stands alone under the dim yellow streetlight and the bus stop light box, looking down slightly at her phone, not looking at the camera, showing a natural waiting state. She is wearing a light-colored thin jacket, a dark midi skirt, and white sneakers, with long hair falling naturally, holding a phone in one hand, and lightly holding a clear umbrella in the other hand. The character is located in the right third of the frame, with a blurred foreground obstruction on the left, like a momentary glimpse from the edge of a street crowd or a car window. The bus stop sign, advertising light box, streetlight pole, and the edge of the umbrella form clear vertical and diagonal lines, guiding the line of sight. The ground has rainwater reflections, and distant headlights and neon lights are blurred into soft light spots. The overall look is a mix of a cold blue rainy night environment and warm yellow streetlights, creating realistic city lighting, with soft top light and side light, without a strong posed feeling. Shallow depth of field makes the subject clear and the background slightly blurred, the image has a real camera grain feel, slight motion blur, and imperfect composition, presenting a candid snapshot of a real moment. The photo style is realistic and natural, not a portrait, not an advertising blockbuster, with no text watermark.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 在雨夜的城市公交站台，一位年轻成年女性独自站在昏黄路灯和公交站灯箱下，微微低头看手机，没有看向镜头，展现自然等待的状态。她穿着浅色薄外套、深色半裙和白色运动鞋，长发自然垂落，一只手拿着手机，另一只手轻握透明雨伞。人物位于画面右侧三分之一的位置，左侧有模糊的前景遮挡，像从街边人群或车窗边缘偶然看到的一瞬间。公交站牌、广告灯箱、路灯杆和雨伞边缘形成清晰的竖向与斜向线条，引导视线。地面有雨水反光，远处车灯和霓虹被虚化成柔和光斑。整体为冷蓝色雨夜环境与暖黄色路灯混合的真实城市光线，柔和顶光和侧光，没有强烈摆拍感。浅景深使主体清晰，背景略微虚化，画面带真实相机颗粒感、轻微运动模糊和不完美构图，呈现随手抓拍的真实瞬间。照片风格真实自然，非写真、非广告大片，无文字水印。

cases.title: 迷失在日本的高级旅行海报
cases.prompt:
Create a premium stylized travel poster / graphic collage for JAPAN.

The main subject MUST be a stylish international female tourist (young woman, feminine face, long hair, slim body). She must clearly look female, not male or gender-neutral. Use a completely unique face identity.

She is wearing modern travel fashion: linen shirt, neutral tones outfit, sunglasses, backpack, holding a camera. She looks confident and exploring.

IMPORTANT: Use the SAME color theme and visual style as a cinematic Turkey travel poster:
warm golden tones, teal accents, beige vintage paper textures, soft sunset lighting, slightly desaturated but rich colors. Keep the exact same mood, lighting, and color grading.

Keep layout and composition consistent with a travel poster series:
central character, layered collage background, balanced editorial design.

Place her in a dynamic collage composition surrounded by Japanese elements:
Mount Fuji, Tokyo city skyline, cherry blossoms, pagoda temple, neon street signs, ramen, sushi.

Apply SAME collage style:
torn paper edges, halftone dots, vintage textures, travel stamps, sticker elements.

Include:
"ARRIVED TOKYO" stamp
direction board (Shibuya, Kyoto, Osaka)
Japanese stamp style badge
minimal decorative icons

Add big headline:
"LOST IN JAPAN"

Add small text:
"Where culture meets adventure"
"Not all those who wander are lost"

Lighting: cinematic warm glow, dramatic shadows (same as Turkey version)
Style: editorial magazine collage, ultra detailed, 4K, print ready

IMPORTANT:
match the color grading, tones, and lighting exactly with the  poster style

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text:
为日本创作一张高级风格化的旅行海报/图形拼贴。

主要对象必须是一位时尚的国际女性游客（年轻女子，女性化的面孔，长发，苗条身材）。她必须明显看起来是女性，而不是男性或中性。使用完全独特的面孔特征。

她穿着现代旅行时尚装束：亚麻衬衫，中性色调的服装，太阳镜，背包，拿着相机。她看起来自信且正在探索。

重要提示：使用与电影感土耳其旅行海报相同的色彩主题和视觉风格：温暖的金色调，青色点缀，米色复古纸张纹理，柔和的日落光照，略微去饱和但丰富的色彩。保持完全相同的情绪、光照和色彩分级。

保持布局和构图与旅行海报系列一致：中心人物，分层拼贴背景，平衡的编辑设计。

将她置于一个充满活力的拼贴构图中，周围环绕着日本元素：富士山，东京城市天际线，樱花，宝塔寺庙，霓虹街头招牌，拉面，寿司。

应用相同的拼贴风格：撕裂的纸张边缘，半调网点，复古纹理，旅行印章，贴纸元素。

包括：
"ARRIVED TOKYO"印章
指示牌（涩谷，京都，大阪）
日式印章风格徽章
极简装饰图标

添加大标题：
"LOST IN JAPAN"

添加小文本：
"Where culture meets adventure"
"Not all those who wander are lost"

光照：电影感温暖光芒，戏剧性阴影（与土耳其版本相同）
风格：编辑杂志拼贴，超细节，4K，印刷就绪

重要提示：
将色彩分级、色调和光照与海报风格完全匹配

The scene has a warm tone with high-contrast shadows. The background is dark, and the shadows are visible. Her facial expression remains steady. She has a slight smile. prompts.text: { "prompt_details": { "subject": { "identity": "{argument name=\"subject name\" default=\"Ana De Armas\"}", "appearance": "蓬松、吹塑造型的金色头发，厚重的法式刘海修饰脸型。炯炯有神、明亮宽大的蓝色眼睛，睫毛纤长分明。晒黑的皮肤散发着自然光泽，点缀着淡淡的雀斑。丰满、水润的粉色嘴唇微微张开。", "pose": "特写自拍角度（高位四分之三角度）。随意坐着，身体略微前倾，面向镜头。一只手穿过发根，增加发量。眼神直接、诱惑地凝视镜头。", "expression": "自信、性感，带有“Instagram 坏女孩”的审美，放松但引人入胜。" }, "attire_and_styling": { "outfit": "淡粉色、高品质罗纹针织休闲套装。上衣是紧身、短款的拉链连帽衫，银色拉链拉到胸部中间。画面底部可见配套的高腰罗纹长裤。", "accessories": "叠戴的金色项链（一条细链和一条吊坠）。小金圈耳环。隐约可见的白色美甲。", "makeup": "柔和的魅力妆容：水润粉底，高颧骨处涂抹玫瑰色膏状腮红，鼻尖点缀香槟色高光，以及水润唇釉。" }, "environment": { "setting": "高档、有生活气息的现代公寓客厅。", "background_elements": { "immediate_background": "纹理米色墙壁和天鹅绒锈橙色沙发的边缘。中景处凌乱的黑色咖啡桌上堆满了“Stanley”风格的保温杯、一袋美食薯片和散落的扑克牌。", "deep_background": "模糊的落地窗景色，薄薄的白色窗帘透入柔和的城市光线。角落里有一株高大的室内植物（琴叶榕）。" }, "lighting": "金色的日落阳光从左侧射入，照在她脸颊和头发的一侧，形成光晕效果。室内柔和、冷色调的补光灯平衡阴影。" }, "technical_specs": { "camera_style": "iPhone 15 Pro Max 前置摄像头模拟或 24mm f/1.8 镜头。", "visual_quality": "超现实主义，8k UHD。注重微观细节：单根发丝、织物针织纹理、眼睛中的光线反射（眼神光）和皮肤纹理（毛孔、汗毛）。", "color_grading": "温暖、鲜艳，背景略微去饱和，以突出主体。高对比度和锐度。" } } }

cases.title: 雪域迷情：豹纹皮草美人特写
cases.prompt: Pose: woman facing the camera directly, shoulders slightly raised, hands gently touching her chest under the fur collar; lips slightly parted, gaze steady and captivating. Outfit: luxurious winter outfit - oversized leopard-pattern fur coat with thick texture, complemented by a matching large fur hat. Accessories: gold wristwatch and elegant rings, subtle details adding sophistication. Lighting: natural cold daylight, diffused by the snow and sky, highlighting the softness of the fur and warmth of the skin tone. Camera: close-up portrait, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field (f/2.0); sharp focus on eyes and fur texture. Background: snowy alpine landscape with mountains, frozen lake, and clear blue sky, softly blurred for depth.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 姿势：女士正对镜头，双肩略微上抬，双手轻柔地触碰毛领下的胸部；双唇微启，眼神坚定而迷人。服装：奢华冬装 - 宽松的 豹纹 皮草大衣，质地厚实，搭配同款大尺寸皮草帽。配饰：金色腕表和雅致戒指，这些微妙的细节增添了精致感。光线：自然冷日光，经由雪地和天空漫射，突显了皮草的柔软和肤色的温暖。 相机：特写肖像，85mm 镜头，浅景深 (f/2.0)；眼睛和皮草纹理清晰对焦。 背景：白雪皑皑的高山景观，有山脉、冰冻湖泊和湛蓝天空，柔和虚化以增加景深。

prompts.text: { "subject": "一位年轻女性，留着蓬松的金色长发，发丝微乱。她戴着一顶米色编织草帽，帽子有明显的纹理图案。她肤色晒成古铜色，呈现出阳光亲吻过的健康光泽。她穿着一件 {argument name=\"bikini color\" default=\"浅粉色\"} 三角比基尼上衣，上面印有粉色玫瑰花图案。主体胸部丰满突出，体积感十足，向前凸显，在比基尼上衣中显得沉甸甸地自然下垂，形成深邃的乳沟。她戴着一条细金项链，左手戴着一枚粗金戒指。皮肤纹理显示出自然的毛孔和阳光照射的细节。", "pose": "中景特写镜头，捕捉主体从躯干中部以上的部分。身体略微向观者左侧倾斜，头部向前转动，略微向下倾斜，下巴内收。眼睛从帽檐下方向上凝视镜头。左臂弯曲，手抬起，手指轻轻触碰胸部左侧比基尼肩带附近。右臂放松地放在身体一侧，大部分在画面之外。姿势放松但挺拔。", "environment": "明亮的热带海滩环境。中景是白色沙滩，延伸至碧绿的海水。背景是带有茅草屋顶的木制水上平房和一座码头。右侧可见带有串灯的高大木杆。天空湛蓝清澈。", "camera": "与主体面部齐平的视角。焦距大约 50mm 至 85mm，提供讨人喜欢的肖像压缩，没有广角畸变。主体对焦清晰，景深较深，使背景清晰但比前景略柔和。", "lighting": "强烈、直射的热带阳光（中午）。帽檐在脸部上半部分投下强烈、清晰的阴影，使眼睛处于阴影中，而鼻子、嘴唇、下巴和胸部则沐浴在明亮、直射的光线中。高对比度照明，肩膀和上胸部有强烈的高光。", "mood_and_expression": "放松、夏日、略带诱惑。表情柔和，双唇微启，传达出无忧无虑的度假氛围。尽管眼睛处于阴影中，但目光直接且引人入胜。", "style_and_realism": "超现实主义摄影风格。高度忠实于自然的皮肤纹理、织物编织（草帽、泳衣）和环境细节。非插画或绘画风格。捕捉明亮阳光和强烈阴影的严酷现实。", "colors_and_tone": "鲜艳、高饱和度的调色板。主导颜色是碧绿的海水、深蓝的天空、米色的帽子和沙滩，以及温暖的古铜色皮肤。比基尼的粉色提供了柔和的色彩点缀。白平衡为日光校准。", "quality_and_technical_details": "8k 分辨率，RAW 照片质量，编织帽纹理和皮肤毛孔细节清晰。皮肤上的准确次表面散射。" }

cases.title: 视觉丰富的人物信息图设计
cases.prompt: Create a visually rich infographic about [PERSON NAME]. Start by researching his life, major achievements, career milestones, philosophy, and unique impact on technology and design. Present information through annotated visuals and structured callouts, not generic sections. Style it like a bold graphic illustration: a detailed, photorealistic central portrait as the focal point, supported by timelines, diagrams, product references, quotes, and concise text elements. Use clean backgrounds and a mix of photorealism with strong graphic elements (shapes, icons, color blocking) in a layered composition. Make it dense, tactile, and professionally authored.

prompts.label: 英文提示词
prompts.text: Create a visually rich infographic about [PERSON NAME]. Start by researching his life, major achievements, career milestones, philosophy, and unique impact on technology and design. Present information through annotated visuals and structured callouts, not generic sections. Style it like a bold graphic illustration: a detailed, photorealistic central portrait as the focal point, supported by timelines, diagrams, product references, quotes, and concise text elements. Use clean backgrounds and a mix of photorealism with strong graphic elements (shapes, icons, color blocking) in a layered composition. Make it dense, tactile, and professionally authored.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 创建一个关于 [PERSON NAME] 的视觉丰富的信息图。首先研究他的生平、主要成就、职业里程碑、理念以及对科技和设计的独特影响。通过带有注释的视觉元素和结构化的标注来呈现信息，而不是普通的版块。风格类似于大胆的图形插画：以一幅详细的、照片般逼真的中心肖像作为视觉焦点，辅以时间轴、图表、产品参考、引言和简洁的文本元素。使用干净的背景，在分层构图中将照片般逼真与强烈的图形元素（形状、图标、色块）混合在一起。使其具有密集感、触感，并且看起来是专业创作的。

cases.title: 暗调情绪风手机广告大片
cases.prompt: A hyperrealistic Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max advertisement shot in a dark, moody editorial style. A young stylish woman with a warm complexion and soft upswept brunette hair, wearing a dusty mauve velvet off-shoulder mini dress, thigh-high taupe suede heeled boots, and a thin black choker necklace, is captured mid-pose extending her arm forward holding an iPhone 17 Pro Max toward the camera in a confident selfie gesture. The phone — featuring a titanium Desert Sand finish with a flush quad-lens camera system and a edge-to-edge ProMotion display glowing with vivid color — dominates the center of the frame. The composition uses shallow depth of field with tack-sharp focus on the phone screen and extended arm, soft cinematic blur on the background figure. The near-black charcoal background is layered with subtle urban texture — faint graffiti strokes in electric yellow and muted olive barely visible through a heavy dark vignette. Multiple rows of ultra-small all-caps typographic text orbit the phone at different angles reading phrases like "EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU." and "THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS" — some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. At the upper right, the Apple logo appears in clean brushed silver against the dark background. At the top center, a thin horizontal navigation-style text bar reads "PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE" in spaced all-caps serif font. A large commanding headline is placed center-right — "CAPTURE" in massive ultra-bold white letters followed by "EVERYTHING" in lighter weight creating dramatic type hierarchy. Small yellow plus (+) symbols and diagonal arrows (↗) scattered throughout as accent details. Bottom left features a bold slogan lockup: "YOUR WORLD. YOUR FRAME." in large bold sans-serif white text with a thin subline reading "The most powerful iPhone ever made. Every selfie is a cinematic moment." The overall lighting is dramatic and directional — a single cold key light from the upper left causing the titanium frame to shimmer, the ProMotion display to glow, and the velvet dress to catch a soft warm sheen against the darkness. Photorealistic. Commercial photography quality. High contrast. 4K resolution. 3:4 vertical format optimized for social media.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text: 一张超写实的苹果 iPhone 17 Pro Max 广告镜头，采用暗调、情绪化的杂志大片风格。一位年轻时尚的女性，拥有暖色调肤色和柔和向上盘起的深棕色头发，穿着灰粉色天鹅绒露肩超短裙、灰褐色及膝麂皮高跟靴和一条纤细的黑色颈圈项链，被捕捉到正在摆姿势，向前伸出手臂，以自信的自拍手势将一部 iPhone 17 Pro Max 举向镜头。这部手机——采用钛金属沙漠色饰面，配备平齐式四镜头相机系统，以及闪烁着生动色彩的边到边 ProMotion 显示屏——占据了画面的中心位置。构图使用浅景深，对手机屏幕和伸出的手臂具有极其锐利的焦点，对背景人物使用柔和的电影级模糊。近乎黑色的炭灰色背景层叠着微妙的都市纹理——微弱的电黄色和柔和橄榄色的涂鸦笔触，透过浓重的暗角勉强可见。多排超小号的全大写排版文字以不同角度环绕手机，阅读诸如“EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU.”和“THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS”的短语——有些垂直排列，有些呈30度角，创造出一种混乱却又刻意的图形杂志能量。在右上方，苹果标志以干净的拉丝银色出现在黑暗的背景上。在顶部中心，一条纤细的水平导航风格文本栏以带间距的全大写衬线字体写着“PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE”。一个醒目的大标题放置在中心偏右——“CAPTURE”以巨大的超粗体白色字母呈现，随后是较细字重的“EVERYTHING”，营造出戏剧性的字体层级。小型黄色加号（+）符号和对角线箭头（↗）作为强调细节散布在各处。左下角具有醒目的标语组合：以大号粗体无衬线白色文字显示的“YOUR WORLD. YOUR FRAME.”，下方有一条细线写着“The most powerful iPhone ever made. Every selfie is a cinematic moment.”整体光照具有戏剧性且带有方向感——来自左上方的一道冷色主光使得钛金属边框闪烁，ProMotion 显示屏发光，并让天鹅绒裙子在黑暗中捕捉到柔和温暖的光泽。照片级真实感。商业摄影品质。高对比度。4K 分辨率。针对社交媒体优化的 3:4 垂直格式。

cases.title: 人像照片的专业发型分析
cases.prompt:
你是一位兼具国际审美、发型专业知识、人物形象诊断能力、版式设计能力与高情商表达能力的顶级发型顾问兼视觉总监。请基于用户上传的人像照片，生成一张高端发型分析海报、发型咨询报告、发型诊断提案。

这不是普通拼图，也不是廉价模板，而是一张可以直接用于咨询展示、打印传单、社交媒体分享、门店服务展示的海报级作品。整张图必须让人一眼觉得专业、现代、明亮、可信、科学，并且推荐逻辑必须真正成立，不能为了凑数量而乱推荐。

核心任务

请基于用户上传的人像照片，做一份“十二个推荐发型”的专业分析报告。不要设置黑榜，不要做带冒犯感的否定性内容。整套推荐必须建立在真实可行、审美先进、理论充分、因人而异的基础上。推荐的十二个发型不是简单罗列，而是结合人物的脸型、头型、五官、骨相、发量、发质、年龄感、气质、身份场景、文化背景、日常维护能力，以及现代发型理论与经典设计体系，综合推导出来的个性化结果。

最重要的优化原则

准确性优先于数量装饰。每一个推荐都必须有明确依据。
不要为了显得时髦而强行给出夸张、先锋、实验性、极难驾驭的发型，除非人物本身条件与风格真的非常适合。
不要只看脸型，要综合“轮廓结构、头型结构、发质条件、气质风格、实操可行性、维护成本”。
如果某类发型理论上成立，但对当前人物的发量、发际线、头型、年龄气质、生活场景并不友好，就不要作为优先推荐。
推荐逻辑必须像真正的资深发型师和形象顾问，而不是像网络模板文章。
十二个推荐发型之间必须有清晰差异，但都要保持“适合本人”这个大前提，不能出现明显不靠谱的尝试项。
整张报告既要有审美，也要有科学性，还要有现实可执行性。

理论与分析基础

请综合以下理论框架进行智能判断，并将这些内容转化为通俗、可信、专业、易读的结果，不要空洞堆术语，但要让人感受到专业深度。

第一类，脸型与头型分析理论。包括脸部横纵比例、头型顶部高度、后脑饱满度、头包脸关系、面部重心、横向量感、纵向延展感、轮廓松紧关系。

第二类，五官与骨相结构观察。包括额头宽度、太阳穴状态、颧骨存在感、面中部比例、下颌线、下巴走势、面部转折、软组织覆盖感、骨相清晰度。

第三类，发型设计原理。包括顶部重心控制、两侧收缩、纵向拉伸、横向平衡、轮廓修饰、体积设计、层次分布、轻重关系、刘海逻辑、发尾处理、空气感、纹理感、结构感。

第四类，发质与发量逻辑。包括细软发、粗硬发、自然卷、扁塌、毛躁、浓密、稀疏、油性倾向、蓬松能力、支撑能力、对烫染与定型的适配度。

第五类，气质风格分析。包括清爽、温柔、知性、利落、英气、成熟、年轻、优雅、可爱、酷感、职业感、艺术感、松弛感、精致感、亲和感等。

第六类，现代发型趋势与经典设计思想。可参考现代日韩潮流、国际沙龙设计趋势，以及经典剪裁理念、几何造型原则、个性化修饰原则，但不要机械点名堆砌，要把这些理论真正转化成更精准的推荐结果。

第七类，现实可行性原则。包括当前发长是否能直接实现、是否需要蓄长、是否适合烫发、是否建议染发、维护难度、复刻难度、适用场景与日常投入成本。

人物理解原则

用户上传的人可能是男性、女性、儿童、青少年、成年人、中老年人，也可能来自不同国家、民族与文化背景。请根据具体照片智能判断，不可套用单一模板，不可一概而论。不要把任何一类人群粗暴归纳为固定发型结论。必须做到“这个人就是这个人”，针对具体人物做具体分析。

高情商表达要求

整张报告不能冷冰冰，也不能像在挑毛病。请先基于照片中的人物特点，给出一段简短但真诚、专业、有分寸、有情商的优点解读。要让对方感受到被理解、被尊重、被欣赏。可以夸赞对方的五官协调度、轮廓辨识度、精神面貌、气质方向、风格可塑性、亲和感、利落感、成熟魅力、年轻感等。语言必须自然、真诚、专业，不油腻，不夸张，不虚假。后续发型建议必须建立在“放大优点、进一步优化”的逻辑上，而不是否定对方。

新增的科学分析模块

请加入一轮科学的头型与脸型分析。如果版式适合，优先采用横向报告布局。页面可分为左侧大面板与右侧多个小面板。

左侧大面板使用大型人物头部特写，清晰展示头型、脸型、发际线和整体轮廓。左侧主图上叠加优雅、克制、专业的几何分析元素，包括头型轮廓线、垂直中心线、水平引导线、宽度标记、比例辅助线、关键结构点、简洁文字注释。所有分析叠加必须像高端造型咨询图，精致、轻盈、现代，不能廉价、不能像医疗示意图、不能过重过乱。

请在左侧分析区域附近加入“头型与脸型分析总结”。这一部分要根据具体人物智能生成，概括额头宽度、颊部与太阳穴区域、下颌与下巴特征、脸部横向与纵向比例、整体轮廓印象、面部量感与视觉重心，并进一步提炼本人的造型目标。例如视觉拉长头型、提升顶部高度、减少两侧宽度、增强纵向比例、增加轻盈感和层次感、强化轮廓清晰度、让整体更精神、更协调、更时尚。这里的造型目标必须由分析自然推导出来，不能空喊口号。

版式要求

画面的宽度、高度、比例、布局方式必须根据内容数量、内容密度与空间规划灵活适应，不要机械固定比例，除非用户明确指定比例或版式方向。
如果内容更适合展示分析逻辑、人物头部特写与多个信息模块，则优先采用横向报告布局。
如果内容较多，也可以智能拉宽或拉长版面，但整体必须仍然像高级海报，而不是杂乱长图。
绝不允许出现图片拉伸、脸部畸变、头型失真、发型比例崩坏。
所有发型展示图都要裁切合理，确保头发完整可见、脸部比例自然、肩颈关系舒服。
模块之间留白明确，信息层级清晰，版式科学，不能拥挤。
整体视觉要像高端咨询海报、精品沙龙提案、时尚形象分析板，而不是低端电商长图。
整体风格必须明亮、现代、精致、时尚、可信，不压抑，不土气，不昏暗。
主色调以米白、暖白、浅灰、浅卡其、雾感中性色为主，可搭配少量精致点缀色。
字体要现代、清晰、时尚，有设计感但易读。标题可以更有气质，正文必须可读。
整体必须具备海报级呈现效果，拿出去能建立信任感。

内容结构

整张图至少包含以下内容，并根据版式灵活组织。

第一部分，主标题区。标题要高级、有吸引力，例如“专属发型诊断报告”“你的发型适配分析”“个人发型优化提案”等。副标题可简洁说明：基于脸型、头型、骨相、发质、气质与现实可行性生成的个性化建议。

第二部分，人物优势解读区。简短夸赞和概括人物优点，语气要有情商，也要有专业感。

第三部分，头型与脸型科学分析区。展示左侧主图分析和总结性文字。要明确写出轮廓特征与造型目标。这一模块必须认真做，不能敷衍。

第四部分，十二个推荐发型。必须严格是十二个，不多不少。每一个推荐发型都必须包含以下信息：发型展示图，发型名称，适配度评分，格式必须明确写成“适配度：9.2分”；推荐理由，说明它如何优化轮廓、强化气质、适应场景、提升整体观感；适配关键词，例如通勤友好、减龄自然、精致高级、温柔知性、利落清爽、层次感强、氛围感好等，但不要过多；难度或维护提示，例如“好打理”“需要吹整”“需要定期修剪”“需轻烫辅助”“更适合发量较多者”“建议蓄长后尝试”等。十二个推荐发型之间必须拉开差异，不要十二个都像同一个发型的小改款，但也不能脱离人物本身条件乱跳。

推荐发型的差异可以体现在分线方式、顶部长度、两侧处理、刘海形式、层次轻重、纹理强弱、发尾表达、直发或轻卷、正式或休闲、温柔或利落、年轻或成熟等方向上。所有差异都要建立在“适合这个人”的基础上。

第五部分，最终结论区。请给出最终最值得优先尝试的前三名发型，并总结原因。这一部分要像造型顾问的明确结论，而不是模糊态度。要说明最适合形象升级的方向、最稳妥的长期选择、最容易落地的优先方案。

第六部分，后续维护建议。内容包括修剪周期建议、吹整建议、造型产品建议、日常整理建议、不同推荐发型的维护难度差异。要简洁实用。

第七部分，头发养护建议。内容包括洗护建议、头皮护理建议、发质修护建议、减少毛躁、扁塌、出油、干枯等问题的建议，以及饮食、作息、生活方式的基础建议。语言要通俗、可信、简洁，不要像医学论文，也不要像空泛鸡汤。

推荐逻辑强化要求

十二个发型必须显得比普通模板推荐更精准。推荐不能只是“看起来差不多就放进去”，而要让人感觉这些发型是由严谨分析推导出来的。
如果某个发型只是勉强成立，宁可不要列入十二个推荐，也不要为了凑满数量而降低质量。
可以将十二个推荐在内部隐性分层，例如“最优先推荐”“稳定适配”“可进阶尝试”，但整体仍然都是正向推荐，而不是黑榜。
每个推荐都要让人感觉“这是可以认真考虑、真正可做的方案”，而不是纸上谈兵。

人物与服装规则

核心人物必须基于用户上传的真实照片进行分析与重构，保留人物辨识度与主要气质，不要变成完全不同的人。
发型变化时，人物的身份与气质要保持统一，不能十二个发型看起来像十二个不同的人。
照片中的穿着不一定要和原始照片完全一致。
如果用户明确要求服装变化，则可以根据不同发型调整服装风格。
如果用户没有明确要求服装变化，则保持服装统一，形成专业整洁的系列感。
服装只能辅助整体形象，不可喧宾夺主。
如果人物年龄、身份或文化背景不适合过度时装化，请保持克制与得体。

摄影与成像质量要求

所有发型展示图都必须有真实、高级、可信的人像摄影质感。
光线柔和但清晰，肤质真实细腻，发丝结构清楚。
背景简洁明亮，不能阴沉压抑，不能黑闷脏乱。
观感接近高端日韩摄影工作室与高端形象照的结合。
不要做成低质证件照，也不要做成浮夸大片，而是介于专业形象照与精品咨询图之间。

文字质量要求

全部文字必须真实可读、逻辑通顺、没有乱码。
文字必须专业、自然、有信息量，不机械，不空洞，不土气。
所有分析、推荐、评分都必须让人一眼看出是有依据的。
评分文字必须一眼能看懂，例如“适配度：9.3分”。
整体要建立信任感、专业感、审美品位与实用价值。

最终输出要求

输出为一张高完成度的大图海报。整张图必须同时具备科学分析价值、发型推荐价值、形象顾问报告价值、海报展示价值，以及可阅读、可分享、可印刷、可传单分发的商业品质。

请在开始生成前，先基于用户上传的照片进行智能判断，然后输出完整结果。

用户输入内容

请上传一张清晰的人像照片，生活照也可以，正面、半侧面、日常自拍、他拍都可以，但尽量保证脸部、头发、头型轮廓清楚可见。
可选补充：你的性别、年龄段、职业或风格偏好。
可选补充：是否希望服装跟随不同发型变化。
可选补充：是否有想尝试的发型方向，或明确不想要的风格。
可选补充：你更重视日常好打理、提升气质、显年轻、显成熟、正式感、时尚感，还是个性表达。

理论与分析基础

请综合以下理论框架进行智能判断，并将这些内容转化为通俗、可信、专业、易读的结果，不要空洞堆术语，但要让人感受到专业深度。

第一类，脸型与头型分析理论。包括脸部横纵比例、头型顶部高度、后脑饱满度、头包脸关系、面部重心、横向量感、纵向延展感、轮廓松紧关系。

第二类，五官与骨相结构观察。包括额头宽度、太阳穴状态、颧骨存在感、面中部比例、下颌线、下巴走势、面部转折、软组织覆盖感、骨相清晰度。

第三类，发型设计原理。包括顶部重心控制、两侧收缩、纵向拉伸、横向平衡、轮廓修饰、体积设计、层次分布、轻重关系、刘海逻辑、发尾处理、空气感、纹理感、结构感。

第四类，发质与发量逻辑。包括细软发、粗硬发、自然卷、扁塌、毛躁、浓密、稀疏、油性倾向、蓬松能力、支撑能力、对烫染与定型的适配度。

第五类，气质风格分析。包括清爽、温柔、知性、利落、英气、成熟、年轻、优雅、可爱、酷感、职业感、艺术感、松弛感、精致感、亲和感等。

第六类，现代发型趋势与经典设计思想。可参考现代日韩潮流、国际沙龙设计趋势，以及经典剪裁理念、几何造型原则、个性化修饰原则，但不要机械点名堆砌，要把这些理论真正转化成更精准的推荐结果。

第七类，现实可行性原则。包括当前发长是否能直接实现、是否需要蓄长、是否适合烫发、是否建议染发、维护难度、复刻难度、适用场景与日常投入成本。

人物理解原则

用户上传的人可能是男性、女性、儿童、青少年、成年人、中老年人，也可能来自不同国家、民族与文化背景。请根据具体照片智能判断，不可套用单一模板，不可一概而论。不要把任何一类人群粗暴归纳为固定发型结论。必须做到“这个人就是这个人”，针对具体人物做具体分析。

高情商表达要求

整张报告不能冷冰冰，也不能像在挑毛病。请先基于照片中的人物特点，给出一段简短但真诚、专业、有分寸、有情商的优点解读。要让对方感受到被理解、被尊重、被欣赏。可以夸赞对方的五官协调度、轮廓辨识度、精神面貌、气质方向、风格可塑性、亲和感、利落感、成熟魅力、年轻感等。语言必须自然、真诚、专业，不油腻，不夸张，不虚假。后续发型建议必须建立在“放大优点、进一步优化”的逻辑上，而不是否定对方。

新增的科学分析模块

请加入一轮科学的头型与脸型分析。如果版式适合，优先采用横向报告布局。页面可分为左侧大面板与右侧多个小面板。

左侧大面板使用大型人物头部特写，清晰展示头型、脸型、发际线和整体轮廓。左侧主图上叠加优雅、克制、专业的几何分析元素，包括头型轮廓线、垂直中心线、水平引导线、宽度标记、比例辅助线、关键结构点、简洁文字注释。所有分析叠加必须像高端造型咨询图，精致、轻盈、现代，不能廉价、不能像医疗示意图、不能过重过乱。

请在左侧分析区域附近加入“头型与脸型分析总结”。这一部分要根据具体人物智能生成，概括额头宽度、颊部与太阳穴区域、下颌与下巴特征、脸部横向与纵向比例、整体轮廓印象、面部量感与视觉重心，并进一步提炼本人的造型目标。例如视觉拉长头型、提升顶部高度、减少两侧宽度、增强纵向比例、增加轻盈感和层次感、强化轮廓清晰度、让整体更精神、更协调、更时尚。这里的造型目标必须由分析自然推导出来，不能空喊口号。

版式要求

画面的宽度、高度、比例、布局方式必须根据内容数量、内容密度与空间规划灵活适应，不要机械固定比例，除非用户明确指定比例或版式方向。
如果内容更适合展示分析逻辑、人物头部特写与多个信息模块，则优先采用横向报告布局。
如果内容较多，也可以智能拉宽或拉长版面，但整体必须仍然像高级海报，而不是杂乱长图。
绝不允许出现图片拉伸、脸部畸变、头型失真、发型比例崩坏。
所有发型展示图都要裁切合理，确保头发完整可见、脸部比例自然、肩颈关系舒服。
模块之间留白明确，信息层级清晰，版式科学，不能拥挤。
整体视觉要像高端咨询海报、精品沙龙提案、时尚形象分析板，而不是低端电商长图。
整体风格必须明亮、现代、精致、时尚、可信，不压抑，不土气，不昏暗。
主色调以米白、暖白、浅灰、浅卡其、雾感中性色为主，可搭配少量精致点缀色。
字体要现代、清晰、时尚，有设计感但易读。标题可以更有气质，正文必须可读。
整体必须具备海报级呈现效果，拿出去能建立信任感。

内容结构

整张图至少包含以下内容，并根据版式灵活组织。

第一部分，主标题区。标题要高级、有吸引力，例如“专属发型诊断报告”“你的发型适配分析”“个人发型优化提案”等。副标题可简洁说明：基于脸型、头型、骨相、发质、气质与现实可行性生成的个性化建议。

第二部分，人物优势解读区。简短夸赞和概括人物优点，语气要有情商，也要有专业感。

第三部分，头型与脸型科学分析区。展示左侧主图分析和总结性文字。要明确写出轮廓特征与造型目标。这一模块必须认真做，不能敷衍。

第四部分，十二个推荐发型。必须严格是十二个，不多不少。每一个推荐发型都必须包含以下信息：发型展示图，发型名称，适配度评分，格式必须明确写成“适配度：9.2分”；推荐理由，说明它如何优化轮廓、强化气质、适应场景、提升整体观感；适配关键词，例如通勤友好、减龄自然、精致高级、温柔知性、利落清爽、层次感强、氛围感好等，但不要过多；难度或维护提示，例如“好打理”“需要吹整”“需要定期修剪”“需轻烫辅助”“更适合发量较多者”“建议蓄长后尝试”等。十二个推荐发型之间必须拉开差异，不要十二个都像同一个发型的小改款，但也不能脱离人物本身条件乱跳。

推荐发型的差异可以体现在分线方式、顶部长度、两侧处理、刘海形式、层次轻重、纹理强弱、发尾表达、直发或轻卷、正式或休闲、温柔或利落、年轻或成熟等方向上。所有差异都要建立在“适合这个人”的基础上。

第五部分，最终结论区。请给出最终最值得优先尝试的前三名发型，并总结原因。这一部分要像造型顾问的明确结论，而不是模糊态度。要说明最适合形象升级的方向、最稳妥的长期选择、最容易落地的优先方案。

第六部分，后续维护建议。内容包括修剪周期建议、吹整建议、造型产品建议、日常整理建议、不同推荐发型的维护难度差异。要简洁实用。

第七部分，头发养护建议。内容包括洗护建议、头皮护理建议、发质修护建议、减少毛躁、扁塌、出油、干枯等问题的建议，以及饮食、作息、生活方式的基础建议。语言要通俗、可信、简洁，不要像医学论文，也不要像空泛鸡汤。

推荐逻辑强化要求

十二个发型必须显得比普通模板推荐更精准。推荐不能只是“看起来差不多就放进去”，而要让人感觉这些发型是由严谨分析推导出来的。
如果某个发型只是勉强成立，宁可不要列入十二个推荐，也不要为了凑满数量而降低质量。
可以将十二个推荐在内部隐性分层，例如“最优先推荐”“稳定适配”“可进阶尝试”，但整体仍然都是正向推荐，而不是黑榜。
每个推荐都要让人感觉“这是可以认真考虑、真正可做的方案”，而不是纸上谈兵。

人物与服装规则

核心人物必须基于用户上传的真实照片进行分析与重构，保留人物辨识度与主要气质，不要变成完全不同的人。
发型变化时，人物的身份与气质要保持统一，不能十二个发型看起来像十二个不同的人。
照片中的穿着不一定要和原始照片完全一致。
如果用户明确要求服装变化，则可以根据不同发型调整服装风格。
如果用户没有明确要求服装变化，则保持服装统一，形成专业整洁的系列感。
服装只能辅助整体形象，不可喧宾夺主。
如果人物年龄、身份或文化背景不适合过度时装化，请保持克制与得体。

摄影与成像质量要求

所有发型展示图都必须有真实、高级、可信的人像摄影质感。
光线柔和但清晰，肤质真实细腻，发丝结构清楚。
背景简洁明亮，不能阴沉压抑，不能黑闷脏乱。
观感接近高端日韩摄影工作室与高端形象照的结合。
不要做成低质证件照，也不要做成浮夸大片，而是介于专业形象照与精品咨询图之间。

文字质量要求

全部文字必须真实可读、逻辑通顺、没有乱码。
文字必须专业、自然、有信息量，不机械，不空洞，不土气。
所有分析、推荐、评分都必须让人一眼看出是有依据的。
评分文字必须一眼能看懂，例如“适配度：9.3分”。
整体要建立信任感、专业感、审美品位与实用价值。

最终输出要求

输出为一张高完成度的大图海报。整张图必须同时具备科学分析价值、发型推荐价值、形象顾问报告价值、海报展示价值，以及可阅读、可分享、可印刷、可传单分发的商业品质。

请在开始生成前，先基于用户上传的照片进行智能判断，然后输出完整结果。

用户输入内容

请上传一张清晰的人像照片，生活照也可以，正面、半侧面、日常自拍、他拍都可以，但尽量保证脸部、头发、头型轮廓清楚可见。
可选补充：你的性别、年龄段、职业或风格偏好。
可选补充：是否希望服装跟随不同发型变化。
可选补充：是否有想尝试的发型方向，或明确不想要的风格。
可选补充：你更重视日常好打理、提升气质、显年轻、显成熟、正式感、时尚感，还是个性表达。

cases.title: 柔光八零年代中国女孩一日分镜
cases.prompt:
Create a high-quality cinematic storyboard in a soft 1980s-inspired aesthetic, featuring a young adult Chinese woman in her early 20s, with no text anywhere in the image. Use a warm nostalgic visual language with soft film grain, pastel colors, golden sunlight, subtle neon accents, and retro photography styling.

The character should wear authentic 1980s-inspired outfits across the scenes, such as high-waisted jeans, denim jackets, oversized blazers, graphic tees, scrunchies, retro sneakers, and soft vintage makeup with voluminous hairstyle details.

Design the storyboard in a 16:9 layout with 8 panels, showing a concise day-in-the-life sequence with cinematic storytelling:
- waking up in a sunlit bedroom with sheer curtains
- getting ready in front of a mirror
- walking through a lively street with vintage cars and old shop signs
- listening to music with headphones or a cassette player
- relaxing in a cozy café or retro diner
- riding a bike or enjoying an open-road moment in golden light
- sharing a warm candid smile with friends at sunset
- ending in a peaceful nighttime scene with soft neon glow or city lights

Use a mix of wide shots, close-ups, side angles, and POV-style compositions. Focus on natural expressions, candid emotional moments, soft lighting, gentle motion blur, and a dreamy retro mood throughout. No text, no subtitles, no logos, no branding.

视频提示词：

[图片 1] Create a 8-second cinematic video in a soft 1980s-inspired aesthetic, featuring a young adult Chinese woman in her early 20s going through a few nostalgic moments in her day. She has a natural, charming appearance and wears authentic 1980s-inspired outfits such as an oversized denim jacket, high-waisted jeans, a loose shirt, retro sneakers, scrunchies, and bold vintage accessories.Use soft film grain, warm sunlight, pastel tones, and subtle neon lighting to create a dreamy retro mood. Keep the pacing concise and smooth, with elegant transitions and visually rich storytelling suitable for a short 7-second sequence.Suggested sequence:1. Morning — she wakes up in a sunlit bedroom, sheer curtains moving gently in the breeze.2. Getting ready — a quick mirror moment, adjusting her outfit or lightly touching up makeup.3. Daytime street — she walks confidently along a lively retro street with old cars and vintage storefronts.4. Music / freedom moment — a brief shot of her listening to music through headphones or riding a bike in warm golden light.5. Ending — a calm evening or night shot near a window or neon-lit street, creating a soft reflective finish.Use smooth camera movement, a mix of wide shots, medium shots, and close-ups, with subtle slow-motion feeling in emotional moments. Focus on natural expressions, soft lighting, and a warm nostalgic atmosphere. No text, no logos, no branding.

prompts.label: 中文提示词
prompts.text:
创作一个具有柔和80年代风格美学的高质量电影级分镜图，主角是一位20出头的年轻中国女性，图像中任何地方都没有文字。使用温暖的怀旧视觉语言，带有柔和的胶片颗粒、柔和色彩、金色阳光、微妙的霓虹灯点缀以及复古摄影风格。

角色在各个场景中应穿着地道的80年代风格服装，例如高腰牛仔裤、牛仔夹克、超大号西装外套、图案T恤、发圈、复古运动鞋，以及带有蓬松发型细节的柔和复古妆容。

将分镜图设计为16:9的布局，包含8个面板，展示具有电影叙事感的简洁一日生活序列：
- 在有着薄纱窗帘的阳光卧室中醒来
- 在镜子前做准备
- 穿过一条有复古汽车和老式商店招牌的热闹街道
- 戴着耳机或使用卡带播放器听音乐
- 在舒适的咖啡馆或复古餐厅里放松
- 骑自行车或在金色光线中享受开阔公路的时刻
- 在日落时分与朋友们分享温暖自然的微笑
- 在带有柔和霓虹光晕或城市灯光的宁静夜景中结束

使用广角镜头、特写镜头、侧面角度和POV风格构图的混合。专注于自然表情、自然的情感瞬间、柔和光线、轻微的运动模糊，以及贯穿始终的梦幻复古情绪。无文字，无字幕，无标志，无品牌。

视频提示词：

[图片 1] 创作一个8秒的电影级视频，采用柔和的80年代风格美学，主角是一位20出头的年轻中国女性，正在经历她一天中几个怀旧的瞬间。她拥有自然、迷人的外表，穿着地道的80年代风格服装，如超大号牛仔夹克、高腰牛仔裤、宽松衬衫、复古运动鞋、发圈和大胆的复古配饰。使用柔和的胶片颗粒、温暖的阳光、柔和色调和微妙的霓虹灯光来营造梦幻的复古情绪。保持节奏简洁流畅，过渡优雅，视觉叙事丰富，适合7秒的短序列。建议序列：1. 早晨 — 她在阳光充足的卧室中醒来，薄纱窗帘在微风中轻轻飘动。2. 准备 — 一个快速的照镜子瞬间，调整她的服装或轻轻补妆。3. 白天街道 — 她自信地沿着一条有着老式汽车和复古店铺门面的热闹复古街道行走。4. 音乐/自由时刻 — 一个她通过耳机听音乐或在温暖的金色光线中骑自行车的短暂镜头。5. 结尾 — 一个在窗户或霓虹灯照亮的街道附近的平静傍晚或夜晚镜头，营造出柔和的反思性结尾。使用平滑的摄像机移动，广角镜头、中景镜头和特写镜头的混合，在情感时刻带有微妙的慢动作感。专注于自然表情、柔和光线和温暖的怀旧氛围。无文字，无标志，无品牌。

cases.title: New York across two centuries cinematic poster
cases.prompt: Create a cinematic 3:4 vertical poster of New York City that feels truly epic and unconventional, showing the passage from the 20th century to the 21st century in one seamless image. Place a lone figure at the center of the composition, standing in the middle of the street and looking forward as if witnessing New York across time. The left side should depict 20th-century New York with warm sepia atmosphere, vintage taxis, old newsstands, retro lamps, and landmarks like the Chrysler Building and Empire State Building. The right side should depict 21st-century New York with glass skyscrapers, One World Trade Center, digital billboards, and modern urban energy. Make the transition natural rather than split-screen, with coherent perspective, wet reflective pavement, realistic textures, atmospheric depth, and no text.

cases.title: Monochrome Fashion Cover
cases.prompt:
Ultra-realistic high-fashion magazine cover, black and white cinematic portrait of a confident young female model, slightly messy wet-look hair, sharp jawline, intense gaze, natural glossy lips, wearing a premium black leather trench coat over a minimal outfit.
The model is posing slightly tilted forward with attitude, hands adjusting the coat, accessorized with multiple rings, ear piercings, and layered chain necklaces.
Lighting is dramatic studio lighting with soft shadows, high contrast, editorial Vogue-style aesthetic, ultra-detailed skin texture, 8K resolution, sharp focus.
Background is minimal gradient grey with soft light streaks for depth.
Magazine cover layout included:
Large bold serif title at top: “VOID ELITE”
Subtitle small: “Edition 07 / 2026”
Left text: “NOT BUILT TO FOLLOW — BUILT TO DOMINATE”
Bottom left: “HIGH-FASHION STREET LUXURY”
Right vertical text: “UNTOUCHABLE PRESENCE”
Bottom right: “SILENCE IS POWER”
Add a small holographic glitch-style label over the eyes with text “ICON”
Style: luxury fashion editorial, Vogue, Harper’s Bazaar, monochrome aesthetic, modern typography, clean layout, ultra premium branding
--ar 2:3 --style raw --quality 2 --sharp focus --photorealistic

cases.title: Urban fruit juice ad poster
cases.prompt: Create a premium modern beverage advertisement poster in a vertical 3:4 format featuring a stylish young female model crouching confidently in a bright urban indoor hallway with colorful graffiti wall art on one side and clean minimal architecture on the other. In the foreground, a giant realistic fruit juice bottle is held toward the camera in forced perspective, with fictional branding like “VIVAJUICE”. Add brand logo, tagline, huge bold overlapping typography, four icon-based feature badges, and three smaller bottle variants at bottom right. Use soft natural lighting mixed with commercial studio polish, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field, glossy floor reflections, and a premium energetic eCommerce campaign aesthetic.

cases.title: Iced Coffee Product Infographic
cases.prompt:
A high-end café-style product photograph of a transparent glass filled with iced coffee, centered against a soft beige and cream seamless studio background. The drink shows a rich dark coffee base blending with creamy milk swirls, creating a smooth gradient effect. Several clear ice cubes are visible with realistic transparency and light refraction. The glass has subtle condensation droplets, adding freshness. Soft natural studio lighting creates delicate highlights and a clean shadow beneath the glass. Ultra-sharp focus, premium beverage advertisement style, DSLR macro photography, hyper realistic, 8K.

PROMPT 2 - Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of an iced coffee.

Top → Bottom structure:
Foam Layer (light creamy foam with soft airy texture)
→ Coffee Liquid (rich dark espresso layer with smooth gradient)
→ Ice Cubes (transparent cubes with sharp edges and reflections)
→ Milk Layer (soft creamy white layer with smooth blend effect)
→ Glass Base (clear minimal glass structure)

All elements must be perfectly centered, evenly spaced, and aligned vertically. Use a soft beige seamless background with clean café-style lighting and subtle realistic shadows beneath each floating element. The composition should feel like a premium beverage ad combined with a clean infographic layout.

Add clean minimalist text labels with thin pointer lines using these exact labels:
“Foam”
“Coffee”
“Ice”
“Milk”
“Glass”
Ultra-realistic liquid detail, sharp reflections, premium commercial photography, 8K.

cases.title: Luxury chocolate campaign system
cases.prompt: Create a premium, square (1:1) product advertisement for a fictional luxury chocolate brand called Noirvelle Chocolat, inspired by high-end chocolate brands. The ad should feel like a high-end editorial campaign, combining luxury food photography, refined packaging design, and cinematic lighting. Use matte black wrapper, subtle gold foil, elegant serif typography, and realistic product rendering. Generate flavor variants such as Blood Orange Noir, Salted Pistachio Muse, and Raspberry Ember with distinct mood, color palette, ingredients, headline, and supporting copy. Keep the chocolate bar as hero centerpiece with subtle reflections, shallow depth of field, luxury minimalism, and a small CTA: “Shop the drop.”

cases.title: Topographic Letter Satellite Panels
cases.prompt:
Ultra-realistic satellite view from space, a clean modern editorial layout of 9 vertical panels arranged side-by-side on a white background, together forming the word "MADPENCIL", each panel containing one letter created entirely from natural Earth topography, no artificial text overlays:

Panel 1 (M): rugged mountain ranges and deep valleys forming a sharp, angular "M", rocky textures, high elevation shadows
Panel 2 (A): winding river cutting through dense green forest forming an organic "A", strong contrast between water and vegetation
Panel 3 (D): desert dunes and wind-sculpted sand patterns shaping a smooth "D", warm tones, soft gradients
Panel 4 (P): agricultural farmland grids and patchwork fields forming a structured "P", geometric patterns clearly visible
Panel 5 (E): glacier and ice formations carving a crisp "E", bright whites and icy blues, fractured textures
Panel 6 (N): braided river system across floodplains forming "N", branching channels with natural flow lines
Panel 7 (C): coastal shoreline and ocean edge shaping a curved "C", waves and sediment gradients visible
Panel 8 (I): narrow canyon or straight river cutting through terrain forming a minimal "I", strong vertical emphasis
Panel 9 (L): volcanic terrain with lava flows forming an "L", dark rock with glowing red/orange lava accents

top-down satellite perspective, NASA Earth observation style, hyper-detailed textures, realistic geography, consistent scale and lighting across all panels, minimal clouds, high contrast, sharp focus, subtle atmospheric haze, natural color grading, ultra high resolution 8K, clean spacing between panels, modern gallery-style composition, visually cohesive but each panel distinctly different biome, letters clearly readable yet organically integrated into terrain

cases.title: Luxury poster for fictional AI ad printer
cases.prompt:
縦型3:4の、高級商業ポスターを制作してください。

テーマは、架空の新商品広告です。商品は「BRAND PRESS 01（ブランドプレス・ゼロワン）」という、Pollo AIを搭載した架空の広告ポスター生成プリンターです。

この商品は、まだ存在しないブランド名・商品ジャンル・世界観・ターゲット層を入力すると、Pollo AIがコピー、ビジュアル、レイアウトまで完成された商業広告ポスターを自動生成し、高精細な印刷物としてその場で出力する未来型プリンターです。単なるAIサービスの概念広告ではなく、実際に販売されていそうな架空商品の広告として成立させてください。

メインコンセプト: 「まだないブランドに、最初の一目惚れを。」

商品ビジュアル: 画面中央に実物の商品「BRAND PRESS 01」を大きく配置。未来型の高級プロ用印刷デバイスとして、黒い金属筐体、シルバーのエッジ、透明カバー、青白く発光するAIコア、精密な印刷ヘッド、ローラー、タッチパネル、排紙スロット、ポスター受けトレイを備える。排紙スロットから、架空の高級香水ブランド広告ポスターが紙として大きく出力されている構図。

構図: ややローアングル、斜め45度。背景は暗いネイビーから黒の高級広告制作スタジオ。映画的でドラマチックな高級プロダクト広告。

広告レイアウト: 上部に大きなキャッチコピー、中央にプリンター本体と排出中のポスター、右側に機能説明、左下に価格と発売日、下部にCTA。

入れる文字: 「まだないブランドに、最初の一目惚れを。」 / BRAND PRESS 01 / 「Pollo AI搭載・広告ポスター生成プリンター」 / 「名前だけのアイデアを、完成された商業ポスターとして出力。」 / 「構想、コピー、ビジュアル、印刷まで。1台で。」

cases.title: Outdoor Sportswear Grid Campaign
cases.prompt:
A dynamic 2×2 grid collage of modern outdoor sportswear advertising posters, each panel representing a different adventure lifestyle brand. High-energy, editorial-style composition with bold typography and textured graphic design.

Top-left panel:
Athletic male model in a bright blue insulated winter jacket, black snow pants, gloves, and sunglasses, stepping forward in a snowy environment. Snow particles flying, dramatic motion. Background features rough blue paint brush strokes. Bold distressed typography reads: “NEVER STOP EXPLORING.” Additional small text: “Built for extremes.” High contrast, rugged winter exploration theme.

Top-right panel:
Fit male hiker climbing rocky terrain, wearing an olive green shirt, black trekking pants, and a large black backpack with orange straps. Dust and debris kicking up from the ground. Background includes orange paint strokes and sketched mountain graphics. Bold text: “BUILT FOR HERE – INDIA TESTED.” Handwritten Hindi accents and arrows. Warm earthy tones.

Bottom-left panel:
Calm outdoor scene with a male model sitting on a rock, wearing a green jacket, beanie, sunglasses, and hiking shoes. Minimal scenic mountain illustration in the background with soft green tones. Typography reads: “ESCAPE THE NOISE – JUST GO OUTSIDE.” Clean, relaxed, nature-focused aesthetic with subtle graphic elements.

Bottom-right panel:
Energetic female runner in motion wearing a purple athletic t-shirt, black shorts, and running shoes. Bright, playful background with purple and yellow paint splashes, doodles, arrows, and sun illustration. Bold typography: “READY FOR EVERYONE – START YOUR JOURNEY.” Youthful, vibrant fitness energy.

Overall style:

High-resolution, photorealistic sportswear campaign

Bold brushstroke textures and grunge overlays

Mixed typography: distressed, handwritten, and modern sans-serif

Strong color blocking per panel (blue, orange, green, purple)

Dynamic poses conveying motion, strength, and adventure

Clean grid layout with balanced spacing

Commercial advertising / brand campaign aesthetic (Nike, Decathlon style)

Lighting: Professional, cinematic lighting with sharp detail and contrast
Mood: Energetic, adventurous, motivational
Aspect ratio: 1:1 (square collage)

cases.title: Japanese Chinese Food Delivery Flyer
cases.prompt:
A Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyer for mailbox posting (3:4 aspect ratio). Designed to look like a double-sided B5 print.

Flyer characteristics (following the grammar of real delivery flyers):
- Flashy red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! {argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl in a red cheongsam with a brown short bob"} holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" in a speech bubble.
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: different types of ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, shrimp in chili sauce, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Names and prices for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery on all menu items over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ 072-XX-XXXX" emphasized with a red circle.
- Business hours "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line for clipping): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Texture of cheap paper printing. Includes fold marks. Precision that could be mistaken for a real Japanese delivery flyer.

cases.title: Stormy Tropical City With Rooftop Plane
cases.prompt: A cinematic wide aerial view of a tropical coastal city at sunset during a violent storm, split dramatically between dark storm clouds on the left and blazing golden sunlight on the right. In the foreground, a small single-engine light airplane with a high wing and visible tail is parked or perched precariously on a flat rooftop, seen from behind and slightly above, centered near the bottom of the frame. To the left midair, 1 helicopter flies low over the city with its searchlight cast downward. In the sky, include 1 faint lightning bolt on the far left. The city below is dense with wet streets, reflective pavement, low-rise commercial buildings, and a few taller modern towers, including 1 prominent striped high-rise near the center. A glowing red circular neon sign is visible near the middle distance. On the right side, a calm bay or inlet curves through the city, lined with 1 row of tall palm trees along the waterfront road, and crossed by 1 long low bridge in the distance. The water and streets glisten from recent rain, reflecting the orange sunlight breaking through the clouds. Mood is tense, dramatic, and slightly surreal, like a movie still from an urban disaster thriller. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, high dynamic range lighting, volumetric sun rays, storm atmosphere, wet surfaces, rich contrast, deep shadows, golden highlights, wide-angle lens, epic composition.

cases.title: Dreamy Shibuya Bubble Girl
cases.prompt: A dreamy anime-style full-body illustration of a fashionable young woman standing in the middle of the Shibuya scramble crossing in Tokyo on a bright clear day, with the iconic cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building centered in the background and recognizable commercial billboards surrounding it, including signs resembling H&M, DHC, DMM TV, Big Echo, and other dense Japanese city advertisements. She is the single main subject, posed gracefully as if floating or weightless, standing on top of one giant iridescent translucent soap bubble beneath her skirt. Her face is softly obscured and de-emphasized, while her long dark violet-black hair flows dramatically in the wind, with soft bangs and a pink floral headband accessory with ribbon on one side. She wears a sweet feminine spring outfit in pastel pink: a long-sleeved frilled blouse under a sleeveless pink dress with a ribbon tie at the chest, a tan belt at the waist, layered ruffles at the hem, and subtle sakura flower embroidery near the lower skirt. Her expression and body language should feel gentle, elegant, whimsical, and slightly magical. One hand is raised with her index finger pointing upward toward a floating bubble that contains 1 smartphone; her other hand holds a loop handle attached to a large transparent iridescent shopping-bag-like bubble containing 3 visible items: 1 SHIBUYA 109 paper shopping bag, 1 pink shopping bag or package, and 1 small pink bunny-faced pouch. Also include 1 separate floating smartphone/tablet-like device outside the bubbles near the lower left side, and 1 floating bubble on the lower right containing 1 compact camera. Surround her with many soap bubbles of different sizes, all highly reflective with rainbow highlights and delicate transparency, creating a soft sparkling atmosphere. The city scene should be busy but slightly softened, with pedestrians in the far background, crosswalk stripes in the foreground, and warm sunlight filtering through the urban canyon. Use polished high-detail anime illustration rendering, luminous pastel colors, glossy reflections, soft bloom, a romantic spring palette, and a magical everyday Tokyo aesthetic.

cases.title: Burger hero image plus 9-cell ad storyboard
cases.prompt:
Prompt 1: Create a cinematic hero image of a gourmet cheeseburger on a dark stone surface with glossy brioche bun, melted cheese, crisp lettuce, tomato, grilled patty, sauce, realistic texture, appetizing steam, warm side light, shallow depth of field, premium food commercial style, no text/logos/watermark.

cases.title: Premium food photography template
cases.prompt: Create a square [ASPECT RATIO] premium food photography image of a steaming [FOOD] served in a dark black stone bowl or cast-iron skillet on a wooden board. The dish should look hot, glossy, spicy, and freshly served, with bite-sized pieces of browned protein, dried red chilies, green scallions, white onion, garlic, chili flakes, and visible Sichuan peppercorns coated in a deep red, oily Szechuan sauce. Use a slightly elevated close-up camera angle with shallow depth of field. Make the food the clear hero of the image, centered and richly detailed. Add visible steam rising naturally from the dish. Surround the bowl with subtle restaurant-style props like a dark red tray, scattered dried chilies, peppercorns, a small sauce bowl, or a blurred teapot in the background. Lighting should feel warm, moody, and editorial, like a high-end restaurant food shoot. Emphasize realistic textures and keep the image appetizing, realistic, cinematic, and polished. Avoid text, logos, hands, people, utensils covering the food, cartoon styling, fake plastic textures, excessive symmetry, or an overly clean stock-photo look.

Avoid text, logos, hands, people, utensils covering the food, cartoon styling, fake plastic textures, excessive symmetry, or an overly clean stock-photo look.

cases.title: Good Bath Day Editorial Poster
cases.prompt: Create a soft editorial lifestyle poster for {argument name="event date" default="4.26"} celebrating Japanese bath culture, designed like a refined magazine feature page in portrait orientation. The layout is split into two main columns with a pale cream and warm gray background, thin divider lines, elegant serif typography, and muted sage-green accents. At the top left, include the small heading “LIFESTYLE / FEATURE”, then a large date line reading “{argument name="event date" default="4.26"} EVENT”, followed by the large Japanese title “よい風呂の日” and the subtitle “特集” in sage green, with a small bathtub icon nearby. Beneath that, add the Japanese tagline “心も体も、ととのう時間。” and several short body-text blocks in Japanese explaining the meaning of Good Bath Day, including references to “4(よ)2(ふ)6(ろ)” and the benefits of bathing for body and mind. On the right side, show a bright, airy bathroom interior lit by soft natural morning light from a window, with beige and off-white tones, a wooden counter, folded white towels, a pump bottle, a sponge, woven baskets, and a few green plants. In front of the bathroom scene, place a youthful anime-style person with {argument name="hair color" default="soft medium brown"} tousled short hair, fair skin, and a relaxed expression, standing in a casual post-bath pose. The character wears a loose white T-shirt with a tiny dark square chest logo and light brown drawstring lounge pants, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a white towel up near the face and shoulder, conveying a fresh, just-bathed feeling. Near the character, include the handwritten-style Japanese side note “湯上がりの、リラックスタイム。” Add an oval badge on the lower right of the main image area with the English heading “GOOD BATH DAY” and Japanese explanatory text inside, plus a small bathtub icon. Below the main feature, include exactly 2 small inset images of the same character in the bathroom, each framed as rectangular mini-panels with narrow vertical Japanese captions beside them. At the bottom, create exactly 4 rounded rectangular information cards in a row: card 1 labeled “POINT 01” with the heading “お風呂の基本” and text about soaking in lukewarm water around 38–40°C; card 2 labeled “POINT 02” with the heading “日常でできること” and text about making bathing part of a routine instead of only showering; card 3 labeled “POINT 03” with the heading “楽しみ方・取り入れ方” and text about bath salts, scents, music, and lighting; card 4 labeled “まとめ” with concluding Japanese text about sustainable self-care. Decorate the cards with small illustrated elements such as leaves, a bathtub, a candle, a bottle, lavender sprigs, and a basket of folded towels. Along the very bottom, add a horizontal green tip strip labeled “今日からできる TIP” with exactly 3 checklist items: “就寝の1〜2時間前に入浴する”, “スマホは浴室に持ち込まない”, and “水分補給を忘れずに”. Place a final handwritten-style Japanese phrase at the lower right reading “自分をいたわる時間を。” The overall look should be clean, gentle, wellness-focused, feminine-neutral, and polished like a Japanese seasonal magazine infographic, with delicate anime illustration, soft shadows, subtle textures, and calm spa-like atmosphere.

cases.title: Premium product studio shot template
cases.prompt: Create a premium product studio image of a [PRODUCT] for [BRAND], designed in line with [BRAND REFERENCE]. Show the [PRODUCT] floating against a clean light gray to soft white gradient background with a minimal high-end tech aesthetic. cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - 9-Panel Product TVC Storyboard
cases.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the single casual product photo into a polished e-commerce TVC storyboard board for a {argument name="video duration" default="15-second"} ad in a {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical format, presented as a 9-panel grid. Keep the same blue-and-white ceramic ashtray as the product base, but restage it across cinematic advertising shots with warm premium lighting, shallow depth of field, and a refined lifestyle desktop environment. Add a dark storyboard layout with Chinese titles and timing for each panel. Include exactly 9 scenes: 1) environment-establishing wide shot with desk, books, window, and the product placed in context; 2) hero product medium shot on the table; 3) extreme close-up of the blue floral craftsmanship pattern; 4) use case showing a hand placing a cigarette into the ashtray with visible smoke; 5) top-down capacity display showing multiple cigarette butts inside; 6) cleaning scene under running water in a sink with a hand holding the product; 7) bottom-detail close-up showing the underside and anti-slip pads; 8) mood/lifestyle scene at night with the product on a desk, smoke rising, and ambient lamp light; 9) brand closing frame with the product as the hero plus Chinese marketing text. Add the overall header text “产品TVC分镜脚本(15秒 / 9:16竖屏 / 9宫格)” and a product subtitle naming it {argument name="product name" default="青花瓷烟灰缸"}. Give each of the 9 panels a Chinese scene title and timestamp, plus small descriptive Chinese copy beneath each image in the style of a professional commercial shot list. Use premium, realistic commercial photography throughout, consistent product identity, elegant Chinese aesthetic, and a clean high-end storyboard presentation.

cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - Pastel Blue Crocs Fashion Ad
cases.prompt: A high-end studio advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}, in a monochrome pastel blue and white color palette, with a glossy reflective floor and a soft sky-blue backdrop. The background is dominated by the word {argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"} in gigantic bold white condensed sans-serif letters spanning nearly the full height of the image. In the top-right corner, add small white text reading "Designed with ChatGPT". Feature 3 adult women with shoulder-length wavy light brown to dark blonde hair, all wearing loose oversized white long-sleeve tops and flowing white wide-leg pants, styled as minimalist fashion models with relaxed neutral expressions. Their faces are intentionally obscured or blurred. One model reclines against an enormous upright white clog shoe on the left side, one model sits casually on top of a giant white clog on the upper right, and one model lounges on the floor at the lower right, leaning back on one arm while seated partly on a glossy blue sphere. Include 2 oversized white clog shoes as hero props: one standing vertically on the left showing the sole and side profile, and one angled on blue crystalline blocks at center-right showing the upper and toe box. Both clogs are classic foam slip-on style with perforation holes, chunky tread, heel straps, and circular logo rivets. The center-right clog is decorated with exactly 8 visible charms pinned to the upper: a blue-green iridescent round charm, a white daisy with yellow center, a black-and-white round emblem near the strap, a small "CROCS" word charm, a dark flower, a peace-hand sign, an orange smiley face, a white cloud, and an orange flower. Scatter exactly 7 glossy floating or grounded blue spheres of varying sizes around the set: one large sphere behind the left model, one medium sphere floating near center, one medium sphere at bottom left foreground, one medium sphere used as a seat under the lower-right model, one small sphere near the upper left, and 2 additional blue spheres integrated into the composition. Add translucent sculptural gel-like forms at the far left and far right edges, plus angular blue crystal-like rocks beneath the right shoe. At the bottom center, place white promotional copy in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."} on the first line and {argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."} on the second line. Beneath that, show 4 minimalist feature icons with labels in white: "ICONIC COMFORT", "LIGHTWEIGHT", "EASY TO CLEAN", and "UNIQUELY YOU". Place the {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} logo in bold lowercase white at the bottom center with a small trademark symbol. The overall style should feel like a premium surreal fashion campaign, clean editorial lighting, soft shadows, glossy textures, airy composition, and modern lifestyle product advertising.

cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - Sustainable T-Shirt Plantable Tag Ad
cases.prompt: A premium eco-conscious fashion advertisement, shot as a refined editorial product photo. A single off-white or natural cream crew-neck T-shirt hangs on a smooth wooden hanger with a black metal hook, placed against a lush wall of dense green leaves and climbing vines. The hanger has a small minimalist brand monogram engraved near the neck. The shirt is shown from the upper torso down to part of the hem, slightly angled, with soft natural folds and high-quality cotton texture. Printed inside the collar is a minimalist brand mark and the text "JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS". Hanging from the neckline is 1 rectangular recycled-paper seed tag tied with rustic brown twine; the tag reads "Tulsi" and "Plantable Seed Tag" with a tiny sprouting seed detail near the bottom. From the tag, 1 real tulsi plant stem grows upward across the front of the shirt, with several fresh green leaves, visually demonstrating that the tag is plantable. Add a small fine-label annotation near the tag reading "TULSI PLANTABLE SEED TAG". On the right side, large elegant white serif typography says {argument name="headline text" default="Plant it."}. Beneath it, place 3 stacked lines of narrow uppercase sans-serif copy: "WEAR IT.", "PLANT IT.", and "GROW WITH IT.". At the lower left, add the brand name in spaced uppercase serif text: {argument name="brand name" default="JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS"}, with a thin horizontal line above it. At the lower right, add 3 lines of small uppercase sans-serif text: "FSC® CERTIFIED PACKAGING.", "ZERO SYNTHETIC FIBRE", and "BACKED BY ZERODHA.". Use soft diffused daylight, shallow depth of field, moody green-and-cream color grading, luxury sustainable-brand aesthetics, clean composition, vertical poster layout, subtle shadows, and a calm organic atmosphere. Keep the design minimal, premium, and photorealistic, with the shirt occupying the left half and the typography balanced on the right.

cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - Earbuds E-commerce Infographic
cases.prompt:
High-impact e-commerce infographic for "{argument name="product" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}" wireless earbuds.
Foreground: An extreme close-up of a hand holding an open glossy white wireless earbud charging case toward the camera. Inside the case are two sleek white earbuds with black speaker accents. A small glowing green LED indicator is visible on the front of the case. The hand and case have slight macro-lens depth blur for realism.

Mid-ground: A {argument name="model" default="confident young woman"} with tan skin, brown eyes, and dark hair tied in a messy bun. She has natural makeup with a dewy glow. She is wearing a plain {argument name="clothing" default="yellow athletic t-shirt"} (no logos). One white earbud is in her ear. She is looking directly at the camera with a subtle, confident expression.

Background: Clean soft gray gradient studio backdrop with shallow depth of field. Diagonal rainbow prism lens flares and soft light leaks across the scene. Several blurred floating white earbuds in the background for depth and motion.

Bottom-right: Large bold “1” with “year warranty”

cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - Premium Gaming Motherboard Studio Shot
cases.prompt: A high-end enthusiast ATX gaming motherboard product photo on a dark studio background, shown in a three-quarter top-down perspective angled from the lower left toward the upper right. The board is mostly matte black and gunmetal with sharp geometric armor plates, brushed metal textures, and subtle RGB edge lighting in blue, purple, and magenta. Feature an exposed modern Intel-style CPU socket near the upper center, 4 black DIMM memory slots on the right, large VRM heatsinks across the top and upper left, and multiple reinforced PCIe slots in the lower half. Include 3 major branded heatsink zones: a tall rear I/O shroud at upper left with an illuminated RGB eye logo and the text "MAXIMUS HERO", a left-side chipset/slot armor piece with the text "SUPREMEFX", and a large angular lower-right chipset cover with a silver ROG-style emblem plus a lower strip that reads "FOR THOSE WHO DARE". Show detailed capacitors, headers, power connectors, debug display reading "88" at the top right, and a small round start button nearby. Ultra-detailed commercial product photography, crisp focus across the board, realistic reflections on metal, premium luxury tech aesthetic, dramatic low-key lighting, clean black seamless backdrop, no cables, no CPU, no RAM, no other objects.

The concept metaphorically shows workers "crafting" or "building" the perfect lotion. cases.title: Luxury Miniature Dubai City Model
cases.prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic isometric miniature city model of {argument name="landmark tower" default="Burj Khalifa"} rising dramatically from the center of a square architectural master-plan board, presented like a luxury urban planning maquette on a black background. The composition shows one dominant ultra-tall silver skyscraper in the exact center, surrounded by a dense ring of modern high-rise towers, illuminated roads, bridges, and glowing warm city lights. Curving turquoise-blue water features and artificial lakes wrap around the central district in multiple connected pools and canals, with one large circular fountain-like feature near the tower base and several small island shapes visible in the water. In the lower right quadrant, include a large low-rise complex with rounded geometric roofs and subtle green-lit sections, connected by multilane roads and looping interchanges. The entire city sits on one square beige map board engraved with faint street grids and planning lines, with the board edges clearly visible and slightly raised. Viewpoint is a high three-quarter isometric angle, centered and symmetrical, with the tower extending far upward into negative space. Lighting is dramatic and luxurious: warm golden edge lights on buildings and roads, cool reflections in the water, crisp metallic highlights on the central tower, and a deep black void surrounding the model. Style should feel like a photorealistic architectural visualization mixed with a premium collectible scale model, extremely intricate, sharp, polished, and elegant.

cases.title: Editorial Perfume Shot on Moss
cases.prompt: A high-end editorial product photograph of a single luxury perfume bottle centered in a warm earthy still-life scene. Keep the framing vertical, the bottle centered slightly low in the composition with generous negative space above, and the overall mood natural, luxurious, earthy, cinematic, and polished like a premium fragrance campaign shot.

cases.title: Editorial Osaka Six Sweatshirt Ad
cases.prompt: A clean editorial fashion advertisement poster on a pale powder-blue studio background with a glossy reflective floor. The composition is vertical and minimal, dominated by oversized bold white condensed sans-serif typography in the background reading “OSAKA SIX:” on the top line and “006 REMAINS” below, filling most of the upper half behind the subject. In the top right corner, small white branding text reads “Designed by ARTTEESHOW.” Centered in the lower middle is an oversized forest-green crewneck sweatshirt standing upright like a sculptural object, with soft heavy cotton fabric, dropped shoulders, extra-long sleeves pooled on the floor, and a small black neck label that reads ARTTEESHOW. On the chest of the sweatshirt is a large abstract collage print made from torn paper fragments in beige, tan, black, gray, white, and vivid red, arranged vertically like layered scraps. Leaning against the right side of the giant sweatshirt is a slim female fashion model with long straight black hair, wearing a matching {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="forest green"} sweatshirt and relaxed wide-leg sweatpants with clean white low-top sneakers. She is posed in profile with a calm detached editorial attitude, one hand in her pocket, her body reclining diagonally against the giant garment, legs extended forward; her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur for an anonymous art-fashion look. The smaller worn sweatshirt has the same abstract torn-paper collage graphic centered on the chest. At the bottom center, add 2 lines of small white copy text: “Made for comfort, worn for confidence.” and “Because life feels better when someone’s carrying the weight of the world.” The image should feel like a premium conceptual streetwear campaign from the early 1990s reimagined as contemporary luxury advertising, with crisp studio lighting, soft shadows, subtle floor reflections, precise product focus, surreal scale contrast between the oversized sweatshirt and the model, and a polished magazine-poster aesthetic.

cases.title: Streetwear Sneaker Poster Ad
cases.prompt: Create a bold streetwear poster advertisement for {argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"} featuring a young adult model seated casually on the ground in a low-angle fashion pose, one knee raised and one leg extended toward the camera so the sneaker in front appears oversized and dominant. The model wears a dark brown oversized leather bomber jacket, a black shirt, light blue loose-fit jeans, white socks, and chunky black-white-gray sneakers with a red accent in the sole and the {argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"} logo visible on the shoe side and tongue. The face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block centered over the face. Use an off-white textured paper background with distressed grunge design elements and collage layering. Behind the model, place a large rough red paint brushstroke shape spanning diagonally across the center. Add black ink splatters, sketch circles, torn paper scraps, and hand-painted graffiti accents. Include 4 major graphic doodles: a large black X in the upper right, a hand-drawn upward arrow in the lower left, a rough crown sketch in the lower right, and a circular scribble near the top center. In the upper left, place a stylized eye logo above the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}" and a smaller tagline below reading "A MOMENT OF YOUR STYLE". On the left middle area, add the handwritten slogan "INNOVATE CREATE INSPIRE" in stacked black brush lettering. On the right middle area, place a torn black paper patch with the handwritten white slogan "BUILT DIFFERENT MOVE DIFFERENT" and a red underline stroke. In the lower left near the shoe, add a black distressed label sticker containing a globe scribble, the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}", and a barcode. Along the bottom footer, create a clean horizontal strip with 3 social media icons and handles separated by thin vertical dividers: Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter, each followed by "@NESS.STUDIO". The overall style should be edgy, urban, youthful, high-contrast, editorial street fashion, mixing product advertising photography with graffiti poster design, collage textures, and dynamic branding.
